A physics-based pose selector first identifies feasible contact regions with optimal force distribution based on surface geometry. Then, a physics-conditioned latent diffusion model (Phy-LDM) predicts the tactile imprint under FOSG target. Last, a latent-space LQR controller drives the gripper toward this tactile imprint with minimal actuation, preventing unnecessary compression. Trained on a physics-conditioned tactile dataset covering diverse objects and contact conditions, the proposed Phy-LDM achieves superior tactile prediction accuracy, while the Phy-Tac outperforms fixed-force and GraspNet-based baselines in grasp stability and force efficiency. Experiments on classical robotic platforms demonstrate force-efficient and adaptive manipulation that bridges the gap between robotic and human grasping.
tldr: The paper introduces Phy-Tac, a physics-conditioned tactile method for force-optimal stable grasping, utilizing a latent diffusion model to predict tactile imprints and an LQR controller for force regulation. Experiments show improved grasp stability and force efficiency compared to baselines.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了Phy-Tac，一种基于物理条件的触觉方法，用于实现力最优的稳定抓取。该方法利用潜在扩散模型预测触觉印记，并使用LQR控制器进行力调节。实验表明，与基线方法相比，抓取稳定性和力效率均有所提高。
summary_zh:
摘要：
人类能够自然地以维持稳定所需的最小力抓取物体，而机器人通常依赖于刚性、过度挤压控制。为缩小这一差距，我们提出了一种受人类启发、基于物理约束的触觉方法（Phy-Tac）用于力最优稳定抓取（FOSG），该方法统一了姿态选择、触觉预测和力调节。首先，基于物理的姿态选择器根据表面几何结构识别出具有最优力分布的可行接触区域。然后，一个基于物理约束的潜在扩散模型（Phy-LDM）预测FOSG目标下的触觉印记。最后，一个潜在空间LQR控制器驱动夹爪朝向该触觉印记，同时以最小的驱动力防止不必要的压缩。所提出的Phy-LDM在涵盖多样对象和接触条件的物理约束触觉数据集上训练，实现了卓越的触觉预测精度，同时Phy-Tac在抓取稳定性和力效率方面优于固定力和基于GraspNet的基线方法。在经典机器人平台上的实验表明，该方法能够实现力高效且自适应的操作，从而弥合了机器人抓取与人类抓取之间的差距。

title: MO-SeGMan: Rearrangement Planning Framework for Multi Objective Sequential and Guided Manipulation in Constrained Environments
summary: In this work, we introduce MO-SeGMan, a Multi-Objective Sequential and Guided Manipulation planner for highly constrained rearrangement problems. MO-SeGMan generates object placement sequences that minimize both replanning per object and robot travel distance while preserving critical dependency structures with a lazy evaluation method. To address highly cluttered, non-monotone scenarios, we propose a Selective Guided Forward Search (SGFS) that efficiently relocates only critical obstacles and to feasible relocation points. Furthermore, we adopt a refinement method for adaptive subgoal selection to eliminate unnecessary pick-and-place actions, thereby improving overall solution quality. Extensive evaluations on nine benchmark rearrangement tasks demonstrate that MO-SeGMan generates feasible motion plans in all cases, consistently achieving faster solution times and superior solution quality compared to the baselines. These results highlight the robustness and scalability of the proposed framework for complex rearrangement planning problems.
tldr: The paper introduces MO-SeGMan, a multi-objective rearrangement planning framework that optimizes object placement sequences in constrained environments by minimizing replanning and travel distance, demonstrating superior performance compared to baselines.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种多目标重排规划框架MO-SeGMan，该框架通过最小化重规划和移动距离来优化受限环境中的对象放置序列，并且实验表明该框架的性能优于基线方法。
summary_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了MO-SeGMan，一种用于高度约束重排问题的多目标序列引导操纵规划器。MO-SeGMan生成对象放置序列，通过惰性评估方法最小化每个对象的重规划次数和机器人移动距离，同时保留关键的依赖结构。为了解决高度杂乱、非单调的场景，我们提出了一种选择性引导前向搜索（SGFS），该方法仅高效地重定位关键障碍物到可行的重定位点。此外，我们采用了一种用于自适应子目标选择的细化方法，以消除不必要的抓取放置动作，从而提高整体解决方案质量。在九个基准重排任务上的大量评估表明，MO-SeGMan在所有情况下都生成了可行的运动规划，与基线方法相比，始终如一地实现了更快的求解时间和更优的解决方案质量。这些结果突出了所提出的框架在复杂重排规划问题中的鲁棒性和可扩展性。

title: CaRLi-V: Camera-RADAR-LiDAR Point-Wise 3D Velocity Estimation
summary: Accurate point-wise velocity estimation in 3D is crucial for robot interaction with non-rigid, dynamic agents, such as humans, enabling robust performance in path planning, collision avoidance, and object manipulation in dynamic environments. To this end, this paper proposes a novel RADAR, LiDAR, and camera fusion pipeline for point-wise 3D velocity estimation named CaRLi-V. This pipeline leverages raw RADAR measurements to create a novel RADAR representation, the velocity cube, which densely represents radial velocities within the RADAR's field-of-view. By combining the velocity cube for radial velocity extraction, optical flow for tangential velocity estimation, and LiDAR for point-wise range measurements through a closed-form solution, our approach can produce 3D velocity estimates for a dense array of points. Developed as an open-source ROS2 package, CaRLi-V has been field-tested against a custom dataset and proven to produce low velocity error metrics relative to ground truth, enabling point-wise velocity estimation for robotic applications.
tldr: CaRLi-V is a novel ROS2 package that fuses camera, RADAR, and LiDAR data to estimate point-wise 3D velocities, demonstrated with low velocity error metrics on a custom dataset, enabling robot interaction with dynamic environments.
tldr_zh: CaRLi-V 是一个新颖的ROS2软件包，它融合了相机、雷达和激光雷达数据，以估计点状3D速度。在自定义数据集上进行了演示验证，具有较低的速度误差指标，从而能够实现机器人与动态环境的交互。
summary_zh: 本文提出一种新颖的RADAR、LiDAR和相机融合流水线，名为CaRLi-V，用于点云级别的3D速度估计。该流水线精确的点云级别的3D速度估计对于机器人与非刚性动态代理（如人类）的交互至关重要，从而能够在动态环境下的路径规划、避障和对象操纵中实现稳健的性能。为此，该流水线利用原始RADAR测量数据创建了一种新型RADAR表示形式，即速度立方体，它密集地表示了RADAR视野内的径向速度。通过结合速度立方体进行径向速度提取、光流进行切向速度估计以及LiDAR进行点云级别的距离测量，并通过闭合形式的解算，我们的方法能够为密集的点云阵列生成3D速度估计。CaRLi-V作为一个开源ROS2软件包开发，已通过自定义数据集进行了实地测试，并证明其相对于真实值产生较低的速度误差指标，从而为机器人应用实现点云级别的速度估计。

title: EREBUS: End-to-end Robust Event Based Underwater Simulation
summary: The underwater domain presents a vast array of challenges for roboticists and computer vision researchers alike, such as poor lighting conditions and high dynamic range scenes. In these adverse conditions, traditional vision techniques struggle to adapt and lead to suboptimal performance. Event-based cameras present an attractive solution to this problem, mitigating the issues of traditional cameras by tracking changes in the footage on a frame-by-frame basis. In this paper, we introduce a pipeline which can be used to generate realistic synthetic data of an event-based camera mounted to an AUV (Autonomous Underwater Vehicle) in an underwater environment for training vision models. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our pipeline using the task of rock detection with poor visibility and suspended particulate matter, but the approach can be generalized to other underwater tasks.
tldr: This paper introduces a pipeline for generating realistic synthetic event-based camera data in underwater environments for training vision models on tasks like rock detection in poor visibility, addressing the limitations of traditional cameras in such conditions.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种生成水下环境中逼真的基于事件的相机数据的流程，用于训练视觉模型来执行诸如在低能见度下进行岩石检测之类的任务，从而解决了传统相机在此类条件下的局限性。
summary_zh: 水下环境为机器人专家和计算机视觉研究人员带来了诸多挑战，例如光照条件差和高动态范围场景。在这些不利条件下，传统的视觉技术难以适应，导致性能欠佳。事件相机通过逐帧跟踪画面变化，缓解了传统相机的问题，为解决该难题提供了一个有吸引力的方案。在本文中，我们提出了一种管道，可用于生成逼真的水下环境中搭载事件相机的AUV（自主水下航行器）的合成数据，用于训练视觉模型。我们利用该管道在低能见度和悬浮颗粒物条件下进行了岩石检测任务，并证明了其有效性，但该方法可以推广到其他水下任务。

title: Embodied Cognition Augmented End2End Autonomous Driving
summary: In recent years, vision-based end-to-end autonomous driving has emerged as a new paradigm. However, popular end-to-end approaches typically rely on visual feature extraction networks trained under label supervision. This limited supervision framework restricts the generality and applicability of driving models. In this paper, we propose a novel paradigm termed $E^{3}AD$, which advocates for comparative learning between visual feature extraction networks and the general EEG large model, in order to learn latent human driving cognition for enhancing end-to-end planning. In this work, we collected a cognitive dataset for the mentioned contrastive learning process. Subsequently, we investigated the methods and potential mechanisms for enhancing end-to-end planning with human driving cognition, using popular driving models as baselines on publicly available autonomous driving datasets. Both open-loop and closed-loop tests are conducted for a comprehensive evaluation of planning performance. Experimental results demonstrate that the $E^{3}AD$ paradigm significantly enhances the end-to-end planning performance of baseline models. Ablation studies further validate the contribution of driving cognition and the effectiveness of comparative learning process. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to integrate human driving cognition for improving end-to-end autonomous driving planning. It represents an initial attempt to incorporate embodied cognitive data into end-to-end autonomous driving, providing valuable insights for future brain-inspired autonomous driving systems. Our code will be made available at Github
tldr: This paper introduces $E^{3}AD$, a novel approach that leverages comparative learning between visual feature extraction networks and EEG large models to incorporate human driving cognition for enhancing end-to-end autonomous driving planning, demonstrating improved performance on existing models.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为$E^{3}AD$的新方法，该方法利用视觉特征提取网络与脑电图大模型之间的对比学习，将人类驾驶认知融入到端到端自动驾驶规划中，并在现有模型上展示了性能的提升。
summary_zh: 近年来，基于视觉的端到端自动驾驶已成为一种新的范式。然而，流行的端到端方法通常依赖于在标签监督下训练的视觉特征提取网络。这种有限的监督框架限制了驾驶模型的通用性和适用性。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为$E^{3}AD$的新范式，该范式提倡视觉特征提取网络与通用EEG大型模型之间的对比学习，以学习潜在的人类驾驶认知，从而增强端到端规划。在这项工作中，我们收集了一个认知数据集用于上述对比学习过程。随后，我们研究了利用人类驾驶认知增强端到端规划的方法和潜在机制，使用流行的驾驶模型作为基线，并在公开可用的自动驾驶数据集上进行实验。我们进行了开环和闭环测试，以对规划性能进行全面评估。实验结果表明，$E^{3}AD$范式显著提高了基线模型的端到端规划性能。消融研究进一步验证了驾驶认知的贡献和对比学习过程的有效性。据我们所知，这是第一个整合人类驾驶认知以改进端到端自动驾驶规划的工作。它代表了将具身认知数据整合到端到端自动驾驶中的初步尝试，为未来类脑自动驾驶系统提供了有价值的见解。我们的代码将在Github上公开。

title: Lyapunov Stability Learning with Nonlinear Control via Inductive Biases
summary: Finding a control Lyapunov function (CLF) in a dynamical system with a controller is an effective way to guarantee stability, which is a crucial issue in safety-concerned applications. Recently, deep learning models representing CLFs have been applied into a learner-verifier framework to identify satisfiable candidates. However, the learner treats Lyapunov conditions as complex constraints for optimisation, which is hard to achieve global convergence. It is also too complicated to implement these Lyapunov conditions for verification. To improve this framework, we treat Lyapunov conditions as inductive biases and design a neural CLF and a CLF-based controller guided by this knowledge. This design enables a stable optimisation process with limited constraints, and allows end-to-end learning of both the CLF and the controller. Our approach achieves a higher convergence rate and larger region of attraction (ROA) in learning the CLF compared to existing methods among abundant experiment cases. We also thoroughly reveal why the success rate decreases with previous methods during learning.
tldr: This paper presents a novel approach to learning Control Lyapunov Functions (CLFs) by treating Lyapunov conditions as inductive biases, leading to improved convergence and larger regions of attraction. The method enables end-to-end learning of both the CLF and the controller.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新的学习控制李雅普诺夫函数 (CLF) 的方法，通过将李雅普诺夫条件视为归纳偏差，从而提高收敛速度和更大的吸引域。 该方法可以对 CLF 和控制器进行端到端学习。
summary_zh: 在具有控制器的动力系统中寻找控制李雅普诺夫函数 (CLF) 是保证稳定性的有效方法，而稳定性是安全相关应用中的关键问题。最近，代表 CLF 的深度学习模型已被应用于学习器-验证器框架，以识别满足条件的候选函数。然而，学习器将李雅普诺夫条件视为复杂的优化约束，难以实现全局收敛。此外，实施这些李雅普诺夫条件进行验证也过于复杂。为了改进该框架，我们将李雅普诺夫条件视为归纳偏置，并设计了一个由该知识指导的神经 CLF 和一个基于 CLF 的控制器。这种设计使得能够在有限的约束下进行稳定的优化过程，并允许对 CLF 和控制器进行端到端的学习。在大量的实验案例中，与现有方法相比，我们的方法在学习 CLF 时实现了更高的收敛速度和更大的吸引域 (ROA)。我们还彻底揭示了先前方法在学习过程中成功率下降的原因。

title: LiDAR-VGGT: Cross-Modal Coarse-to-Fine Fusion for Globally Consistent and Metric-Scale Dense Mapping
summary: Reconstructing large-scale colored point clouds is an important task in robotics, supporting perception, navigation, and scene understanding. Despite advances in LiDAR inertial visual odometry (LIVO), its performance remains highly sensitive to extrinsic calibration. Meanwhile, 3D vision foundation models, such as VGGT, suffer from limited scalability in large environments and inherently lack metric scale. To overcome these limitations, we propose LiDAR-VGGT, a novel framework that tightly couples LiDAR inertial odometry with the state-of-the-art VGGT model through a two-stage coarse- to-fine fusion pipeline: First, a pre-fusion module with robust initialization refinement efficiently estimates VGGT poses and point clouds with coarse metric scale within each session. Then, a post-fusion module enhances cross-modal 3D similarity transformation, using bounding-box-based regularization to reduce scale distortions caused by inconsistent FOVs between LiDAR and camera sensors. Extensive experiments across multiple datasets demonstrate that LiDAR-VGGT achieves dense, globally consistent colored point clouds and outperforms both VGGT-based methods and LIVO baselines. The implementation of our proposed novel color point cloud evaluation toolkit will be released as open source.
tldr: The paper presents LiDAR-VGGT, a framework that fuses LiDAR inertial odometry with a Vision-Language model (VGGT) in a coarse-to-fine manner to reconstruct globally consistent and metric-scale colored point clouds, outperforming VGGT-based methods and LIVO baselines.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了 LiDAR-VGGT，一个通过粗到精的方式融合激光雷达惯性里程计与视觉-语言模型 (VGGT) 的框架，用于重建全局一致且具有度量尺度的彩色点云，其性能优于基于 VGGT 的方法和 LIVO 基线。
summary_zh: 重建大规模彩色点云是机器人学中的一项重要任务，它支持感知、导航和场景理解。尽管激光雷达惯性视觉里程计（LIVO）取得了进展，但其性能仍然对外参标定高度敏感。与此同时，诸如VGGT之类的3D视觉基础模型，在大型环境中面临着有限的可扩展性，并且固有地缺乏度量尺度。为了克服这些局限性，我们提出了LiDAR-VGGT，这是一个新颖的框架，它通过两阶段由粗到精的融合流程，将激光雷达惯性里程计与最先进的VGGT模型紧密耦合：首先，具有鲁棒初始化优化的预融合模块在每个会话中高效地估计VGGT位姿和具有粗略度量尺度的点云。然后，后融合模块增强跨模态3D相似性变换，使用基于边界框的正则化来减少因激光雷达和相机传感器之间FOV不一致导致的尺度失真。在多个数据集上的大量实验表明，LiDAR-VGGT实现了密集、全局一致的彩色点云，并且性能优于基于VGGT的方法和LIVO基线。我们提出的新型彩色点云评估工具包的实现将开源发布。

title: Driving scenario generation and evaluation using a structured layer representation and foundational models
summary: Rare and challenging driving scenarios are critical for autonomous vehicle development. Since they are difficult to encounter, simulating or generating them using generative models is a popular approach. Following previous efforts to structure driving scenario representations in a layer model, we propose a structured five-layer model to improve the evaluation and generation of rare scenarios. We use this model alongside large foundational models to generate new driving scenarios using a data augmentation strategy. Unlike previous representations, our structure introduces subclasses and characteristics for every agent of the scenario, allowing us to compare them using an embedding specific to our layer-model. We study and adapt two metrics to evaluate the relevance of a synthetic dataset in the context of a structured representation: the diversity score estimates how different the scenarios of a dataset are from one another, while the originality score calculates how similar a synthetic dataset is from a real reference set. This paper showcases both metrics in different generation setup, as well as a qualitative evaluation of synthetic videos generated from structured scenario descriptions. The code and extended results can be found at https://github.com/Valgiz/5LMSG.
tldr: This paper introduces a structured five-layer model for generating and evaluating rare driving scenarios using foundational models and a data augmentation strategy, with a focus on diversity and originality metrics.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种结构化的五层模型，利用基础模型和数据增强策略生成和评估稀有驾驶场景，重点关注多样性和原创性指标。
summary_zh: 罕见且具有挑战性的驾驶场景对于自动驾驶汽车的开发至关重要。由于难以实际遇到这些场景，使用生成模型进行模拟或生成是一种流行的解决方法。在先前将驾驶场景表示形式结构化为层模型的努力之后，我们提出了一种结构化的五层模型，以改进对罕见场景的评估和生成。我们结合此模型和大型基础模型，使用数据增强策略来生成新的驾驶场景。与先前的表示形式不同，我们的结构为场景中的每个参与者引入了子类和特征，从而使我们能够使用特定于我们的层模型的嵌入来比较它们。我们研究并调整了两个指标，以评估合成数据集在结构化表示中的相关性：多样性得分估计数据集中的场景彼此之间的差异程度，而原创性得分计算合成数据集与真实参考集的相似程度。本文展示了在不同生成设置中这两个指标的表现，以及对从结构化场景描述生成的合成视频的定性评估。代码和扩展结果可在https://github.com/Valgiz/5LMSG 找到。

title: UniSOT: A Unified Framework for Multi-Modality Single Object Tracking
summary: Single object tracking aims to localize target object with specific reference modalities (bounding box, natural language or both) in a sequence of specific video modalities (RGB, RGB+Depth, RGB+Thermal or RGB+Event.). Different reference modalities enable various human-machine interactions, and different video modalities are demanded in complex scenarios to enhance tracking robustness. Existing trackers are designed for single or several video modalities with single or several reference modalities, which leads to separate model designs and limits practical applications. Practically, a unified tracker is needed to handle various requirements. To the best of our knowledge, there is still no tracker that can perform tracking with these above reference modalities across these video modalities simultaneously. Thus, in this paper, we present a unified tracker, UniSOT, for different combinations of three reference modalities and four video modalities with uniform parameters. Extensive experimental results on 18 visual tracking, vision-language tracking and RGB+X tracking benchmarks demonstrate that UniSOT shows superior performance against modality-specific counterparts. Notably, UniSOT outperforms previous counterparts by over 3.0\% AUC on TNL2K across all three reference modalities and outperforms Un-Track by over 2.0\% main metric across all three RGB+X video modalities.
tldr: The paper introduces UniSOT, a novel unified tracker for single object tracking that works across various reference modalities (bounding box, language, or both) and video modalities (RGB, RGB+Depth, RGB+Thermal, RGB+Event) using uniform parameters, demonstrating superior performance compared to modality-specific trackers.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为UniSOT的新型统一单目标跟踪器，该跟踪器使用统一的参数，可以跨各种参考模态（边界框、语言或两者）和视频模态（RGB、RGB+深度、RGB+热、RGB+事件）工作，并且证明了其性能优于特定模态的跟踪器。
summary_zh: 单目标跟踪旨在视频序列中定位具有特定参考模态（边界框、自然语言或两者）的目标对象，且视频序列具有特定视频模态 (RGB, RGB+深度, RGB+热成像或RGB+事件)。不同的参考模态支持各种人机交互，而复杂场景需要不同的视频模态以增强跟踪的鲁棒性。现有的跟踪器是针对一种或几种视频模态以及一种或几种参考模态设计的，这导致了分离的模型设计并限制了实际应用。实际上，需要一个统一的跟踪器来处理各种需求。据我们所知，目前还没有跟踪器能够同时在上述视频模态下，利用上述参考模态进行跟踪。因此，在本文中，我们提出了一种统一的跟踪器 UniSOT，它使用统一的参数来处理三种参考模态和四种视频模态的不同组合。在18个视觉跟踪、视觉语言跟踪和RGB+X跟踪基准上的大量实验结果表明，UniSOT 相对于特定模态的对应方法表现出优异的性能。值得注意的是，在所有三种参考模态下，UniSOT 在 TNL2K 上超越了之前的对应方法 3.0\% 以上的 AUC 值，并且在所有三种 RGB+X 视频模态下，UniSOT 在主要指标上超越了 Un-Track 2.0\% 以上。

title: Learning to Seek Evidence: A Verifiable Reasoning Agent with Causal Faithfulness Analysis
summary: Explanations for AI models in high-stakes domains like medicine often lack verifiability, which can hinder trust. To address this, we propose an interactive agent that produces explanations through an auditable sequence of actions. The agent learns a policy to strategically seek external visual evidence to support its diagnostic reasoning. This policy is optimized using reinforcement learning, resulting in a model that is both efficient and generalizable. Our experiments show that this action-based reasoning process significantly improves calibrated accuracy, reducing the Brier score by 18\% compared to a non-interactive baseline. To validate the faithfulness of the agent's explanations, we introduce a causal intervention method. By masking the visual evidence the agent chooses to use, we observe a measurable degradation in its performance ($Δ$Brier=+0.029), confirming that the evidence is integral to its decision-making process. Our work provides a practical framework for building AI systems with verifiable and faithful reasoning capabilities.
tldr: The paper presents a reinforcement learning agent that strategically seeks visual evidence to support diagnostic reasoning, improving calibrated accuracy and enabling verifiable explanations through causal intervention analysis.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种强化学习智能体，该智能体能够策略性地寻找视觉证据来支持诊断推理，从而提高校准精度，并通过因果干预分析实现可验证的解释。
summary_zh: 用于医疗等高风险领域的人工智能模型的解释往往缺乏可验证性，这会阻碍信任。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种交互式代理，该代理通过可审计的动作序列来产生解释。该代理学习一种策略，有策略地寻找外部视觉证据来支持其诊断推理。该策略使用强化学习进行优化，从而产生一个既高效又具有泛化性的模型。我们的实验表明，这种基于动作的推理过程显著提高了校准精度，与非交互式基线相比，Brier评分降低了18%。为了验证代理解释的忠实性，我们引入了一种因果干预方法。通过屏蔽代理选择使用的视觉证据，我们观察到其性能出现可衡量的下降（$Δ$Brier=+0.029），证实了该证据是其决策过程不可或缺的一部分。我们的工作为构建具有可验证和忠实推理能力的人工智能系统提供了一个实用框架。

title: Eyes on Target: Gaze-Aware Object Detection in Egocentric Video
summary: Human gaze offers rich supervisory signals for understanding visual attention in complex visual environments. In this paper, we propose Eyes on Target, a novel depth-aware and gaze-guided object detection framework designed for egocentric videos. Our approach injects gaze-derived features into the attention mechanism of a Vision Transformer (ViT), effectively biasing spatial feature selection toward human-attended regions. Unlike traditional object detectors that treat all regions equally, our method emphasises viewer-prioritised areas to enhance object detection. We validate our method on an egocentric simulator dataset where human visual attention is critical for task assessment, illustrating its potential in evaluating human performance in simulation scenarios. We evaluate the effectiveness of our gaze-integrated model through extensive experiments and ablation studies, demonstrating consistent gains in detection accuracy over gaze-agnostic baselines on both the custom simulator dataset and public benchmarks, including Ego4D Ego-Motion and Ego-CH-Gaze datasets. To interpret model behaviour, we also introduce a gaze-aware attention head importance metric, revealing how gaze cues modulate transformer attention dynamics.
tldr: This paper introduces a gaze-guided object detection framework for egocentric videos that incorporates gaze into a Vision Transformer's attention mechanism, demonstrating improved detection accuracy in simulation and public datasets.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种用于自我中心视频的注视引导目标检测框架，该框架将注视融入视觉Transformer的注意力机制中，并在模拟和公共数据集中展示了改进的检测准确性。
summary_zh: 人类注视提供了丰富的监督信号，用于理解复杂视觉环境中视觉注意力的机制。在本文中，我们提出了“目标视线”（Eyes on Target），一种新颖的深度感知和注视引导的物体检测框架，专为以自我为中心的视频设计。我们的方法将从注视导出的特征注入到视觉Transformer（ViT）的注意力机制中，从而有效地将空间特征选择偏向于人类关注的区域。与传统对待所有区域一视同仁的物体检测器不同，我们的方法强调观察者优先考虑的区域，以提高物体检测的性能。我们在一个以自我为中心的模拟器数据集上验证了我们的方法，在该数据集中，人类视觉注意力对于任务评估至关重要，这表明了该方法在评估模拟场景中人类表现方面的潜力。我们通过大量的实验和消融研究评估了我们集成了注视信息的模型的有效性，证明了在自定义模拟器数据集以及包括Ego4D Ego-Motion和Ego-CH-Gaze数据集在内的公共基准上，与不使用注视信息的基线模型相比，检测精度始终有所提高。为了解释模型的行为，我们还引入了一个注视感知的注意力头重要性指标，揭示了注视线索如何调节 Transformer 的注意力动态。

title: Empirical Characterization of Temporal Constraint Processing in LLMs
summary: When deploying LLMs in agentic architectures requiring real-time decisions under temporal constraints, we assume they reliably determine whether action windows remain open or have closed. This assumption is untested. We characterize temporal constraint processing across eight production-scale models (2.8-8B parameters) using deadline detection tasks, revealing systematic deployment risks: bimodal performance distribution (models achieve either 95% or 50% accuracy), extreme prompt brittleness (30-60 percentage point swings from formatting changes alone), and systematic action bias (100% false positive rates in failing models). Parameter count shows no correlation with capability in this range-a 3.8B model matches 7B models while other 7B models fail completely. Fine-tuning on 200 synthetic examples improves models with partial capability by 12-37 percentage points. We demonstrate that temporal constraint satisfaction cannot be reliably learned through next-token prediction on natural language, even with targeted fine-tuning. This capability requires architectural mechanisms for: (1) continuous temporal state representation, (2) explicit constraint checking separate from linguistic pattern matching, (3) systematic compositional reasoning over temporal relations. Current autoregressive architectures lack these mechanisms. Deploying such systems in time-critical applications without hybrid architectures incorporating symbolic reasoning modules represents unacceptable risk.
tldr: This paper empirically evaluates the ability of LLMs to process temporal constraints, revealing significant performance variability and prompting sensitivity. The authors argue that current autoregressive architectures are inadequate for time-critical applications.
tldr_zh: 该论文实证评估了LLM处理时间约束的能力，揭示了显著的性能可变性和提示敏感性。作者认为，当前的自回归架构不足以应对时间关键型应用。
summary_zh: 将大型语言模型部署在需要在时间约束下进行实时决策的代理架构中时，我们假设它们能够可靠地判断操作窗口是否仍然开放或已经关闭。这个假设未经检验。我们使用截止日期检测任务，对八个生产规模的模型（2.8-80亿参数）的临时约束处理进行了表征，揭示了系统性的部署风险：双峰性能分布（模型要么达到95%的准确率，要么只有50%的准确率），极端的提示词脆弱性（仅格式变化就导致30-60个百分点的波动），以及系统性的行动偏差（失效模型中100%的假阳性率）。参数数量与该范围内的能力没有相关性——38亿参数的模型与70亿参数的模型表现相当，而其他70亿参数的模型则完全失效。在200个合成示例上进行微调，可以将具有部分能力的模型提高12-37个百分点。我们证明了即使通过有针对性的微调，也不能通过自然语言的下一个token预测来可靠地学习时间约束满足。这种能力需要以下方面的架构机制：（1）连续时间状态表示，（2）与语言模式匹配分离的显式约束检查，（3）对时间关系的系统性组合推理。目前的自回归架构缺乏这些机制。在没有结合符号推理模块的混合架构情况下，将此类系统部署在时间关键型应用中，代表着不可接受的风险。

title: Learning what to say and how precisely: Efficient Communication via Differentiable Discrete Communication Learning
summary: Effective communication in multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) is critical for success but constrained by bandwidth, yet past approaches have been limited to complex gating mechanisms that only decide \textit{whether} to communicate, not \textit{how precisely}. Learning to optimize message precision at the bit-level is fundamentally harder, as the required discretization step breaks gradient flow. We address this by generalizing Differentiable Discrete Communication Learning (DDCL), a framework for end-to-end optimization of discrete messages. Our primary contribution is an extension of DDCL to support unbounded signals, transforming it into a universal, plug-and-play layer for any MARL architecture. We verify our approach with three key results. First, through a qualitative analysis in a controlled environment, we demonstrate \textit{how} agents learn to dynamically modulate message precision according to the informational needs of the task. Second, we integrate our variant of DDCL into four state-of-the-art MARL algorithms, showing it reduces bandwidth by over an order of magnitude while matching or exceeding task performance. Finally, we provide direct evidence for the \enquote{Bitter Lesson} in MARL communication: a simple Transformer-based policy leveraging DDCL matches the performance of complex, specialized architectures, questioning the necessity of bespoke communication designs.
tldr: This paper presents an extension to Differentiable Discrete Communication Learning (DDCL) for multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL), enabling bit-level precision optimization and achieving significant bandwidth reduction while maintaining performance, suggesting simpler transformer-based policies can outperform complex, specialized communication architectures.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于多智能体强化学习（MARL）的可微离散通信学习（DDCL）的扩展，实现了比特级精度优化，并在保持性能的同时显著降低了带宽，这表明更简单的基于Transformer的策略可以胜过复杂的专用通信架构。
summary_zh: 多智能体强化学习 (MARL) 中的有效通信对于成功至关重要，但受带宽限制，然而过去的方法局限于复杂的门控机制，这些机制仅决定\textit{是否}通信，而非\textit{如何准确地}通信。学习优化比特级的消息精度从根本上来说更加困难，因为所需离散化步骤会破坏梯度流。我们通过推广可微离散通信学习 (DDCL) 来解决这个问题，这是一个用于端到端优化离散消息的框架。我们的主要贡献是将 DDCL 扩展到支持无界信号，将其转化为任何 MARL 架构的通用、即插即用层。我们通过三个关键结果验证了我们的方法。首先，通过在受控环境中的定性分析，我们展示了智能体\textit{如何}学习根据任务的信息需求动态调整消息精度。其次，我们将 DDCL 的变体集成到四种最先进的 MARL 算法中，表明它在匹配或超过任务性能的同时，将带宽减少了一个数量级以上。最后，我们为 MARL 通信中的 “苦涩教训” 提供了直接证据：一个利用 DDCL 的简单基于 Transformer 的策略匹配了复杂、专业架构的性能，质疑了定制通信设计的必要性。

title: Learning Intractable Multimodal Policies with Reparameterization and Diversity Regularization
summary: Traditional continuous deep reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms employ deterministic or unimodal Gaussian actors, which cannot express complex multimodal decision distributions. This limitation can hinder their performance in diversity-critical scenarios. There have been some attempts to design online multimodal RL algorithms based on diffusion or amortized actors. However, these actors are intractable, making existing methods struggle with balancing performance, decision diversity, and efficiency simultaneously. To overcome this challenge, we first reformulate existing intractable multimodal actors within a unified framework, and prove that they can be directly optimized by policy gradient via reparameterization. Then, we propose a distance-based diversity regularization that does not explicitly require decision probabilities. We identify two diversity-critical domains, namely multi-goal achieving and generative RL, to demonstrate the advantages of multimodal policies and our method, particularly in terms of few-shot robustness. In conventional MuJoCo benchmarks, our algorithm also shows competitive performance. Moreover, our experiments highlight that the amortized actor is a promising policy model class with strong multimodal expressivity and high performance. Our code is available at https://github.com/PneuC/DrAC
tldr: This paper introduces a method for learning intractable multimodal policies in RL using reparameterization and diversity regularization, demonstrating improved performance in multi-goal achieving, generative RL, and standard MuJoCo benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种利用重参数化和多样性正则化在强化学习中学习难以处理的多模态策略的方法，并在多目标实现、生成式强化学习和标准MuJoCo基准测试中展示了改进的性能。
summary_zh: 传统连续深度强化学习（RL）算法采用确定性或单峰高斯行动者，无法表达复杂的多模态决策分布。这种局限性会阻碍它们在对多样性至关重要的场景中的表现。目前已经有一些尝试设计基于扩散或摊销行动者的在线多模态强化学习算法。然而，这些行动者是难以处理的，使得现有方法难以同时平衡性能、决策多样性和效率。为了克服这一挑战，我们首先在一个统一的框架内重新构建现有的难处理的多模态行动者，并证明它们可以通过重参数化直接通过策略梯度进行优化。然后，我们提出了一种基于距离的多样性正则化方法，该方法不需要显式的决策概率。我们确定了两个对多样性至关重要的领域，即多目标完成和生成式强化学习，以证明多模态策略和我们方法的优势，尤其是在小样本鲁棒性方面。在传统的MuJoCo基准测试中，我们的算法也显示出具有竞争力的性能。此外，我们的实验强调摊销行动者是一种有前景的策略模型类别，它具有强大的多模态表达能力和高性能。我们的代码可在https://github.com/PneuC/DrAC上获取。

title: Hybrid Neural Network-Based Indoor Localisation System for Mobile Robots Using CSI Data in a Robotics Simulator
summary: We present a hybrid neural network model for inferring the position of mobile robots using Channel State Information (CSI) data from a Massive MIMO system. By leveraging an existing CSI dataset, our approach integrates a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) with a Multilayer Perceptron (MLP) to form a Hybrid Neural Network (HyNN) that estimates 2D robot positions. CSI readings are converted into synthetic images using the TINTO tool. The localisation solution is integrated with a robotics simulator, and the Robot Operating System (ROS), which facilitates its evaluation through heterogeneous test cases, and the adoption of state estimators like Kalman filters. Our contributions illustrate the potential of our HyNN model in achieving precise indoor localisation and navigation for mobile robots in complex environments. The study follows, and proposes, a generalisable procedure applicable beyond the specific use case studied, making it adaptable to different scenarios and datasets.
tldr: This paper presents a hybrid CNN-MLP neural network (HyNN) for indoor robot localization using CSI data converted to synthetic images within a robotics simulator and ROS environment, demonstrating potential for precise navigation and generalizability.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种混合CNN-MLP神经网络（HyNN），用于在机器人模拟器和ROS环境中，利用转换为合成图像的CSI数据进行室内机器人定位，展示了精确导航和通用性的潜力。
summary_zh: 我们提出了一种混合神经网络模型，用于利用大规模MIMO系统的信道状态信息（CSI）数据推断移动机器人的位置。通过利用现有的CSI数据集，我们的方法集成了卷积神经网络（CNN）和多层感知器（MLP），形成一个混合神经网络（HyNN）来估计二维机器人位置。CSI读数使用TINTO工具转换为合成图像。该定位解决方案与机器人仿真器和机器人操作系统（ROS）集成，便于通过异构测试用例进行评估，并采用卡尔曼滤波器等状态估计器。我们的贡献展示了HyNN模型在复杂环境中实现移动机器人精确室内定位和导航的潜力。该项研究遵循并提出了一种可推广的程序，不仅适用于所研究的特定用例，而且可以适应不同的场景和数据集。

title: Discriminately Treating Motion Components Evolves Joint Depth and Ego-Motion Learning
summary: Unsupervised learning of depth and ego-motion, two fundamental 3D perception tasks, has made significant strides in recent years. However, most methods treat ego-motion as an auxiliary task, either mixing all motion types or excluding depth-independent rotational motions in supervision. Such designs limit the incorporation of strong geometric constraints, reducing reliability and robustness under diverse conditions. This study introduces a discriminative treatment of motion components, leveraging the geometric regularities of their respective rigid flows to benefit both depth and ego-motion estimation. Given consecutive video frames, network outputs first align the optical axes and imaging planes of the source and target cameras. Optical flows between frames are transformed through these alignments, and deviations are quantified to impose geometric constraints individually on each ego-motion component, enabling more targeted refinement. These alignments further reformulate the joint learning process into coaxial and coplanar forms, where depth and each translation component can be mutually derived through closed-form geometric relationships, introducing complementary constraints that improve depth robustness. DiMoDE, a general depth and ego-motion joint learning framework incorporating these designs, achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple public datasets and a newly collected diverse real-world dataset, particularly under challenging conditions. Our source code will be publicly available at mias.group/DiMoDE upon publication.
tldr: The paper introduces DiMoDE, an unsupervised depth and ego-motion learning framework that discriminatively treats motion components with geometric constraints, achieving state-of-the-art performance, especially under challenging conditions.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了DiMoDE，一个无监督的深度和自我运动学习框架，它有区分地采用几何约束处理运动分量，从而实现了最先进的性能，特别是在具有挑战性的条件下。
summary_zh: 近年来，深度和自我运动这两项基本的3D感知任务的无监督学习取得了显著进展。然而，大多数方法将自我运动视为一个辅助任务，要么混合所有运动类型，要么在监督中排除深度无关的旋转运动。这种设计限制了对强几何约束的整合，降低了在各种条件下的可靠性和鲁棒性。本研究引入了一种对运动成分的区分性处理方法，利用其各自刚性流的几何规律性来提升深度和自我运动的估计。给定连续的视频帧，网络输出首先对齐源相机和目标相机的光轴和成像平面。帧之间的光流经过这些对齐变换，并量化偏差，以便单独对每个自我运动分量施加几何约束，从而实现更有针对性的细化。这些对齐进一步将联合学习过程重新表述为同轴和共面形式，其中深度和每个平移分量可以通过闭合形式的几何关系相互推导出来，引入了互补约束，从而提高了深度的鲁棒性。DiMoDE，一个包含这些设计的通用深度和自我运动联合学习框架，在多个公共数据集和一个新收集的、多样化的真实世界数据集中，尤其是在具有挑战性的条件下，实现了最先进的性能。我们的源代码将在发布后在mias.group/DiMoDE公开提供。

title: Design and Fabrication of Origami-Inspired Knitted Fabrics for Soft Robotics
summary: Soft robots employing compliant materials and deformable structures offer great potential for wearable devices that are comfortable and safe for human interaction. However, achieving both structural integrity and compliance for comfort remains a significant challenge. In this study, we present a novel fabrication and design method that combines the advantages of origami structures with the material programmability and wearability of knitted fabrics. We introduce a general design method that translates origami patterns into knit designs by programming both stitch and material patterns. The method creates folds in preferred directions while suppressing unintended buckling and bending by selectively incorporating heat fusible yarn to create rigid panels around compliant creases. We experimentally quantify folding moments and show that stitch patterning enhances folding directionality while the heat fusible yarn (1) keeps geometry consistent by reducing edge curl and (2) prevents out-of-plane deformations by stiffening panels. We demonstrate the framework through the successful reproduction of complex origami tessellations, including Miura-ori, Yoshimura, and Kresling patterns, and present a wearable knitted Kaleidocycle robot capable of locomotion. The combination of structural reconfigurability, material programmability, and potential for manufacturing scalability highlights knitted origami as a promising platform for next-generation wearable robotics.
tldr: This paper presents a novel method for designing and fabricating origami-inspired knitted fabrics for soft robotics, demonstrating complex tessellations and a wearable Kaleidocycle robot for locomotion, combining structural reconfigurability, material programmability, and manufacturing scalability.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的设计和制造折纸启发式针织物的方法，用于软体机器人。展示了复杂的镶嵌图案和一个用于移动的可穿戴万花筒机器人，结合了结构可重构性、材料可编程性和制造可扩展性。
summary_zh:
摘要：
采用柔性材料和可变形结构的软体机器人为可穿戴设备提供了巨大的潜力，使其对人机交互更加舒适和安全。然而，同时实现结构完整性和舒适性所需的顺应性仍然是一个重大挑战。在本研究中，我们提出了一种新颖的制造和设计方法，该方法结合了折纸结构的优势以及针织织物的材料可编程性和可穿戴性。我们介绍了一种通用的设计方法，通过对针脚和材料图案进行编程，将折纸图案转化为针织设计。该方法可以在优选方向上产生折叠，同时通过选择性地结合热熔纱来创建围绕顺应性折痕的刚性面板，从而抑制意外的屈曲和弯曲。我们通过实验量化了折叠力矩，并表明针脚图案增强了折叠方向性，而热熔纱则（1）通过减少边缘卷曲来保持几何一致性，以及（2）通过加强面板来防止平面外变形。我们通过成功地复制了复杂的折纸密铺结构，包括三浦折纸、吉村折纸和克雷斯林折纸，以及展示了一种能够运动的可穿戴针织万花筒机器人，来验证了该框架。结构可重构性、材料可编程性和潜在的制造可扩展性的结合突显了针织折纸作为下一代可穿戴机器人一个有前景的平台。

title: An Enhanced Proprioceptive Method for Soft Robots Integrating Bend Sensors and IMUs
summary: This study presents an enhanced proprioceptive method for accurate shape estimation of soft robots using only off-the-shelf sensors, ensuring cost-effectiveness and easy applicability. By integrating inertial measurement units (IMUs) with complementary bend sensors, IMU drift is mitigated, enabling reliable long-term proprioception. A Kalman filter fuses segment tip orientations from both sensors in a mutually compensatory manner, improving shape estimation over single-sensor methods. A piecewise constant curvature model estimates the tip location from the fused orientation data and reconstructs the robot's deformation. Experiments under no loading, external forces, and passive obstacle interactions during 45 minutes of continuous operation showed a root mean square error of 16.96 mm (2.91% of total length), a 56% reduction compared to IMU-only benchmarks. These results demonstrate that our approach not only enables long-duration proprioception in soft robots but also maintains high accuracy and robustness across these diverse conditions.
tldr: This paper presents a cost-effective and accurate proprioceptive method for soft robots by fusing IMU and bend sensor data using a Kalman filter, achieving significant improvements in shape estimation accuracy and long-term stability.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种经济高效且准确的软体机器人本体感知方法，通过使用卡尔曼滤波器融合IMU和弯曲传感器数据，在形状估计的准确性和长期稳定性方面实现了显著改进。
summary_zh: 本研究提出了一种增强型本体感受方法，仅使用市售传感器即可精确估计软体机器人的形状，确保成本效益和易用性。通过将惯性测量单元（IMU）与互补的弯曲传感器集成，减轻了IMU漂移，实现了可靠的长期本体感受。卡尔曼滤波器以相互补偿的方式融合来自两种传感器的分段尖端方向，相较于单传感器方法，提高了形状估计的精度。分段恒定曲率模型从融合的方向数据估计尖端位置，并重建机器人的变形。在45分钟的连续运行中，分别在无负载、外部力和被动障碍物交互条件下进行了实验，结果表明均方根误差为16.96毫米（占总长度的2.91%），与仅使用IMU的基准相比，误差降低了56%。这些结果表明，我们的方法不仅能够实现软体机器人的长期本体感受，而且在这些不同的条件下保持了高精度和鲁棒性。

title: AquaROM: shape optimization pipeline for soft swimmers using parametric reduced order models
summary: The efficient optimization of actuated soft structures, particularly under complex nonlinear forces, remains a critical challenge in advancing robotics. Simulations of nonlinear structures, such as soft-bodied robots modeled using the finite element method (FEM), often demand substantial computational resources, especially during optimization. To address this challenge, we propose a novel optimization algorithm based on a tensorial parametric reduced order model (PROM). Our algorithm leverages dimensionality reduction and solution approximation techniques to facilitate efficient solving of nonlinear constrained optimization problems. The well-structured tensorial approach enables the use of analytical gradients within a specifically chosen reduced order basis (ROB), significantly enhancing computational efficiency. To showcase the performance of our method, we apply it to optimizing soft robotic swimmer shapes. These actuated soft robots experience hydrodynamic forces, subjecting them to both internal and external nonlinear forces, which are incorporated into our optimization process using a data-free ROB for fast and accurate computations. This approach not only reduces computational complexity but also unlocks new opportunities to optimize complex nonlinear systems in soft robotics, paving the way for more efficient design and control.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel optimization algorithm, AquaROM, based on tensorial parametric reduced order models (PROM) for efficient shape optimization of soft robotic swimmers by addressing the computational challenges of simulating nonlinear structures, particularly in FEM simulations.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为AquaROM的新型优化算法，该算法基于张量参数降阶模型（PROM），旨在通过解决模拟非线性结构（尤其是在有限元方法（FEM）模拟中）的计算挑战，来实现软体机器人游泳者的有效形状优化。
summary_zh: 执行软体结构的有效优化，尤其是在复杂的非线性力作用下，仍然是推进机器人技术的关键挑战。使用有限元方法（FEM）建模的软体机器人等非线性结构的仿真，通常需要大量的计算资源，尤其是在优化过程中。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种基于张量参数约简阶模型（PROM）的新型优化算法。 我们的算法利用降维和解近似技术，以促进非线性约束优化问题的有效求解。 结构良好的张量方法使得可以在特定选择的降阶基（ROB）中使用解析梯度，从而显著提高计算效率。 为了展示我们方法的性能，我们将其应用于优化软体机器人游泳器的形状。 这些驱动的软体机器人会受到流体动力作用，从而受到内部和外部的非线性力的作用，这些力通过使用无数据 ROB 纳入我们的优化过程中，以实现快速而准确的计算。 这种方法不仅降低了计算复杂度，而且为优化软体机器人中复杂的非线性系统开辟了新的机会，为更高效的设计和控制铺平了道路。

title: Modulation of temporal decision-making in a deep reinforcement learning agent under the dual-task paradigm
summary: This study explores the interference in temporal processing within a dual-task paradigm from an artificial intelligence (AI) perspective. In this context, the dual-task setup is implemented as a simplified version of the Overcooked environment with two variations, single task (T) and dual task (T+N). Both variations involve an embedded time production task, but the dual task (T+N) additionally involves a concurrent number comparison task. Two deep reinforcement learning (DRL) agents were separately trained for each of these tasks. These agents exhibited emergent behavior consistent with human timing research. Specifically, the dual task (T+N) agent exhibited significant overproduction of time relative to its single task (T) counterpart. This result was consistent across four target durations. Preliminary analysis of neural dynamics in the agents' LSTM layers did not reveal any clear evidence of a dedicated or intrinsic timer. Hence, further investigation is needed to better understand the underlying time-keeping mechanisms of the agents and to provide insights into the observed behavioral patterns. This study is a small step towards exploring parallels between emergent DRL behavior and behavior observed in biological systems in order to facilitate a better understanding of both.
tldr: This paper investigates temporal processing interference in a dual-task setting using deep reinforcement learning agents, finding that agents exhibit similar timing overproduction behavior to humans under dual-task conditions, although neural dynamics don't clearly show dedicated timers.
tldr_zh: 本文使用深度强化学习探索双任务设置中时间处理的干扰，发现智能体在双任务条件下表现出与人类相似的时间高估行为，但神经动力学并未明确显示出专门的计时器。
summary_zh: 本研究从人工智能 (AI) 的角度，在一个双任务范式中探索了时间处理中的干扰。在此背景下，双任务设置被实现为简化版的“煮糊了 (Overcooked)”环境，包含两个变体：单任务 (T) 和双任务 (T+N)。两个变体都包含一个嵌入式的时间生成任务，但双任务 (T+N) 额外包含一个并发的数字比较任务。我们为每个任务分别训练了两个深度强化学习 (DRL) 智能体。这些智能体表现出与人类时间感知研究一致的涌现行为。具体而言，相对于单任务 (T) 智能体，双任务 (T+N) 智能体的时间生产显著过量。该结果在四个目标持续时间内均保持一致。对智能体 LSTM 层中神经动力学的初步分析并未发现专门的或内在的计时器的明显证据。因此，需要进一步研究以更好地理解智能体底层的时间保持机制，并为观察到的行为模式提供见解。本研究是探索涌现的 DRL 行为与生物系统中观察到的行为之间相似之处的一个小步骤，旨在促进对两者的更好理解。

title: OpenMENA: An Open-Source Memristor Interfacing and Compute Board for Neuromorphic Edge-AI Applications
summary: Memristive crossbars enable in-memory multiply-accumulate and local plasticity learning, offering a path to energy-efficient edge AI. To this end, we present Open-MENA (Open Memristor-in-Memory Accelerator), which, to our knowledge, is the first fully open memristor interfacing system integrating (i) a reproducible hardware interface for memristor crossbars with mixed-signal read-program-verify loops; (ii) a firmware-software stack with high-level APIs for inference and on-device learning; and (iii) a Voltage-Incremental Proportional-Integral (VIPI) method to program pre-trained weights into analog conductances, followed by chip-in-the-loop fine-tuning to mitigate device non-idealities. OpenMENA is validated on digit recognition, demonstrating the flow from weight transfer to on-device adaptation, and on a real-world robot obstacle-avoidance task, where the memristor-based model learns to map localization inputs to motor commands. OpenMENA is released as open source to democratize memristor-enabled edge-AI research.
tldr: The paper introduces OpenMENA, an open-source hardware and software platform for memristor-based in-memory computing, validated on digit recognition and robotic obstacle avoidance, aiming to democratize memristor-enabled edge-AI research.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了OpenMENA，一个用于基于忆阻器的内存计算的开源软硬件平台，并在数字识别和机器人避障方面进行了验证，旨在普及忆阻器边缘人工智能研究。
summary_zh: 忆阻器交叉阵列支持片上存储乘法累加和局部可塑性学习，为节能边缘人工智能提供了一条途径。为此，我们提出了Open-MENA (开放式忆阻器内存加速器)，据我们所知，这是首个完全开放的忆阻器接口系统，集成了(i) 一个可复现的忆阻器交叉阵列硬件接口，具有混合信号读-编程-验证环路；(ii) 一个固件-软件堆栈，带有用于推理和设备端学习的高级API；以及(iii) 一种电压增量比例积分(VIPI)方法，用于将预训练权重编程到模拟电导中，然后进行环路芯片微调，以减轻器件的非理想性。OpenMENA通过数字识别进行了验证，展示了从权重转移到设备端自适应的全流程，并在一个真实世界的机器人避障任务中，忆阻器模型学习将定位输入映射到电机命令。OpenMENA已作为开源软件发布，以普及忆阻器赋能的边缘人工智能研究。

title: Terrain-Enhanced Resolution-aware Refinement Attention for Off-Road Segmentation
summary: Off-road semantic segmentation suffers from thick, inconsistent boundaries, sparse supervision for rare classes, and pervasive label noise. Designs that fuse only at low resolution blur edges and propagate local errors, whereas maintaining high-resolution pathways or repeating high-resolution fusions is costly and fragile to noise. We introduce a resolutionaware token decoder that balances global semantics, local consistency, and boundary fidelity under imperfect supervision. Most computation occurs at a low-resolution bottleneck; a gated cross-attention injects fine-scale detail, and only a sparse, uncertainty-selected set of pixels is refined. The components are co-designed and tightly integrated: global self-attention with lightweight dilated depthwise refinement restores local coherence; a gated cross-attention integrates fine-scale features from a standard high-resolution encoder stream without amplifying noise; and a class-aware point refinement corrects residual ambiguities with negligible overhead. During training, we add a boundary-band consistency regularizer that encourages coherent predictions in a thin neighborhood around annotated edges, with no inference-time cost. Overall, the results indicate competitive performance and improved stability across transitions.
tldr: This paper introduces a resolution-aware attention mechanism for off-road semantic segmentation, focusing on improving boundary fidelity and handling label noise by fusing information across different resolutions and refining only uncertain pixels. It could be helpful in robotic navigation.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于越野语义分割的分辨率感知注意力机制，通过融合不同分辨率的信息并仅细化不确定的像素，从而提高边界保真度并处理标签噪声。 这可能对机器人导航有所帮助。
summary_zh: 越野语义分割面临着粗糙、不一致的边界，罕见类别的稀疏监督，以及普遍存在的标签噪声等问题。仅在低分辨率进行融合的设计会模糊边缘并传播局部误差，而保持高分辨率通路或重复高分辨率融合则成本高昂且易受噪声影响。我们提出了一种分辨率感知的令牌解码器，在不完善的监督下平衡全局语义、局部一致性和边界保真度。 大部分计算发生在低分辨率瓶颈处；门控交叉注意力注入精细尺度细节，并且仅对稀疏的、由不确定性选择的像素集进行细化。 各组件经过协同设计和紧密集成：具有轻量级空洞深度可分离细化的全局自注意力恢复局部连贯性；门控交叉注意力从标准高分辨率编码器流集成精细尺度特征，而不会放大噪声；以及类感知的点细化以可忽略的开销校正残留歧义。在训练期间，我们添加了一个边界带一致性正则化器，以鼓励注释边缘周围的薄邻域内的连贯预测，而无需推理时开销。总体而言，结果表明在各种转换中具有竞争力的性能和改进的稳定性。

title: Optimizing Electric Vehicle Charging Station Placement Using Reinforcement Learning and Agent-Based Simulations
summary: The rapid growth of electric vehicles (EVs) necessitates the strategic placement of charging stations to optimize resource utilization and minimize user inconvenience. Reinforcement learning (RL) offers an innovative approach to identifying optimal charging station locations; however, existing methods face challenges due to their deterministic reward systems, which limit efficiency. Because real-world conditions are dynamic and uncertain, a deterministic reward structure cannot fully capture the complexities of charging station placement. As a result, evaluation becomes costly and time-consuming, and less reflective of real-world scenarios. To address this challenge, we propose a novel framework that integrates deep RL with agent-based simulations to model EV movement and estimate charging demand in real time. Our approach employs a hybrid RL agent with dual Q-networks to select optimal locations and configure charging ports, guided by a hybrid reward function that combines deterministic factors with simulation-derived feedback. Case studies in Hanoi, Vietnam, show that our method reduces average waiting times by 53.28% compared to the initial state, outperforming static baseline methods. This scalable and adaptive solution enhances EV infrastructure planning, effectively addressing real-world complexities and improving user experience.
tldr: This paper proposes a novel framework integrating deep RL with agent-based simulations for optimizing EV charging station placement, showing significant reduction in waiting times compared to static baselines in a case study.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的框架，该框架将深度强化学习与基于代理的仿真相结合，以优化电动汽车充电站的布局。案例研究表明，与静态基线方法相比，该方法显著减少了等待时间。
summary_zh: 电动汽车 (EV) 的快速增长需要战略性地部署充电站，以优化资源利用并最大限度地减少用户的不便。强化学习 (RL) 为确定最佳充电站位置提供了一种创新方法；然而，现有方法由于其确定性的奖励系统而面临效率方面的挑战。由于现实世界的情况是动态且不确定的，因此确定性的奖励结构无法完全捕捉充电站选址的复杂性。因此，评估变得成本高昂且耗时，并且较少反映真实场景。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种新的框架，该框架将深度强化学习与基于代理的仿真相结合，以实时模拟电动汽车的移动并估算充电需求。我们的方法采用具有双 Q 网络的混合强化学习代理，以选择最佳位置并配置充电端口，并由结合确定性因素和仿真导出反馈的混合奖励函数指导。在越南河内的案例研究表明，与初始状态相比，我们的方法将平均等待时间减少了 53.28%，优于静态基线方法。这种可扩展且自适应的解决方案增强了电动汽车基础设施规划，有效地解决了现实世界的复杂性并改善了用户体验。

title: Designing for Distributed Heterogeneous Modularity: On Software Architecture and Deployment of MoonBots
summary: This paper presents the software architecture and deployment strategy behind the MoonBot platform: a modular space robotic system composed of heterogeneous components distributed across multiple computers, networks and ultimately celestial bodies. We introduce a principled approach to distributed, heterogeneous modularity, extending modular robotics beyond physical reconfiguration to software, communication and orchestration. We detail the architecture of our system that integrates component-based design, a data-oriented communication model using ROS2 and Zenoh, and a deployment orchestrator capable of managing complex multi-module assemblies. These abstractions enable dynamic reconfiguration, decentralized control, and seamless collaboration between numerous operators and modules. At the heart of this system lies our open-source Motion Stack software, validated by months of field deployment with self-assembling robots, inter-robot cooperation, and remote operation. Our architecture tackles the significant hurdles of modular robotics by significantly reducing integration and maintenance overhead, while remaining scalable and robust. Although tested with space in mind, we propose generalizable patterns for designing robotic systems that must scale across time, hardware, teams and operational environments.
tldr: This paper introduces a software architecture and deployment strategy for the MoonBot platform, a modular space robotic system, emphasizing distributed heterogeneous modularity using ROS2, Zenoh, and a custom deployment orchestrator. It aims to provide generalizable patterns for designing robust and scalable robotic systems that can operate in diverse environments.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种用于模块化空间机器人系统MoonBot的软件架构和部署策略，强调使用ROS2、Zenoh和一个自定义部署协调器的分布式异构模块化方法。其目标是为设计可在不同环境中运行的鲁棒且可扩展的机器人系统提供通用模式。
summary_zh: 本文介绍了MoonBot平台背后的软件架构和部署策略：MoonBot是一个模块化的空间机器人系统，由分布在多台计算机、网络以及最终天体上的异构组件构成。我们提出了一种有原则的分布式异构模块化方法，将模块化机器人扩展到软件、通信和编排，超越了物理重构的范畴。 我们详细描述了我们系统的架构，该架构集成了基于组件的设计、使用ROS2和Zenoh的数据导向型通信模型，以及能够管理复杂多模块组件的部署编排器。这些抽象使动态重构、去中心化控制以及众多操作员和模块之间的无缝协作成为可能。 该系统的核心是我们的开源运动堆栈软件，该软件已通过数月的现场部署进行验证，包括自组装机器人、机器人间协作和远程操作。 我们的架构通过显著降低集成和维护开销，同时保持可扩展性和鲁棒性，从而解决了模块化机器人技术的重大障碍。 虽然我们在设计时考虑了太空应用，但我们提出了可推广的模式，用于设计必须在时间、硬件、团队和运行环境方面扩展的机器人系统。

title: CM-LIUW-Odometry: Robust and High-Precision LiDAR-Inertial-UWB-Wheel Odometry for Extreme Degradation Coal Mine Tunnels
summary: Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) in large-scale, complex, and GPS-denied underground coal mine environments presents significant challenges. Sensors must contend with abnormal operating conditions: GPS unavailability impedes scene reconstruction and absolute geographic referencing, uneven or slippery terrain degrades wheel odometer accuracy, and long, feature-poor tunnels reduce LiDAR effectiveness. To address these issues, we propose CoalMine-LiDAR-IMU-UWB-Wheel-Odometry (CM-LIUW-Odometry), a multimodal SLAM framework based on the Iterated Error-State Kalman Filter (IESKF). First, LiDAR-inertial odometry is tightly fused with UWB absolute positioning constraints to align the SLAM system with a global coordinate. Next, wheel odometer is integrated through tight coupling, enhanced by nonholonomic constraints (NHC) and vehicle lever arm compensation, to address performance degradation in areas beyond UWB measurement range. Finally, an adaptive motion mode switching mechanism dynamically adjusts the robot's motion mode based on UWB measurement range and environmental degradation levels. Experimental results validate that our method achieves superior accuracy and robustness in real-world underground coal mine scenarios, outperforming state-of-the-art approaches. We open source our code of this work on Github to benefit the robotics community.
tldr: The paper presents a robust LiDAR-Inertial-UWB-Wheel Odometry (CM-LIUW-Odometry) framework for SLAM in GPS-denied coal mine environments, achieving high accuracy and robustness by tightly fusing multiple sensors and adaptively switching motion modes.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种鲁棒的 LiDAR-Inertial-UWB-Wheel Odometry (CM-LIUW-Odometry) 框架，用于在 GPS 受限的煤矿环境中进行 SLAM，通过紧密融合多个传感器并自适应切换运动模式，实现了高精度和鲁棒性。
summary_zh: 大规模、复杂且GPS受限的地下煤矿环境中，同步定位与建图（SLAM）面临着严峻的挑战。传感器必须应对异常的运行条件：GPS不可用阻碍了场景重建和绝对地理参考，不平整或湿滑的地形会降低轮式里程计的精度，而狭长且特征匮乏的隧道则降低了激光雷达的有效性。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种基于迭代误差状态卡尔曼滤波器（IESKF）的多模态SLAM框架——煤矿-激光雷达-IMU-UWB-轮式里程计（CM-LIUW-Odometry）。首先，激光雷达-惯性里程计与UWB绝对定位约束进行紧耦合融合，以将SLAM系统与全局坐标对齐。其次，轮式里程计通过紧耦合集成，并由非完整约束（NHC）和车辆杆臂补偿增强，以解决超出UWB测量范围区域的性能下降问题。最后，一种自适应运动模式切换机制根据UWB测量范围和环境退化程度动态调整机器人的运动模式。实验结果验证了我们的方法在真实的地下煤矿场景中实现了卓越的精度和鲁棒性，优于最先进的方法。我们将这项工作的代码开源在Github上，以造福机器人社区。

title: Lateral Velocity Model for Vehicle Parking Applications
summary: Automated parking requires accurate localization for quick and precise maneuvering in tight spaces. While the longitudinal velocity can be measured using wheel encoders, the estimation of the lateral velocity remains a key challenge due to the absence of dedicated sensors in consumer-grade vehicles. Existing approaches often rely on simplified vehicle models, such as the zero-slip model, which assumes no lateral velocity at the rear axle. It is well established that this assumption does not hold during low-speed driving and researchers thus introduce additional heuristics to account for differences. In this work, we analyze real-world data from parking scenarios and identify a systematic deviation from the zero-slip assumption. We provide explanations for the observed effects and then propose a lateral velocity model that better captures the lateral dynamics of the vehicle during parking. The model improves estimation accuracy, while relying on only two parameters, making it well-suited for integration into consumer-grade applications.
tldr: This paper addresses the challenge of lateral velocity estimation in automated parking by proposing a two-parameter model based on real-world parking data analysis, improving accuracy over zero-slip models without requiring specialized sensors.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于真实停车数据分析的横向速度模型，用于解决自动泊车中横向速度估计的难题。该模型仅使用两个参数，在不需要专用传感器的情况下，提高了精度，优于零滑移模型。
summary_zh: 自动泊车需要在狭小空间内快速精确地进行操作，这需要精准的定位。虽然纵向速度可以使用轮速编码器测量，但由于消费级车辆中缺乏专用传感器，横向速度的估计仍然是一个关键挑战。现有方法通常依赖于简化的车辆模型，例如零侧滑模型，该模型假设后轴没有横向速度。众所周知，该假设在低速行驶期间不成立，因此研究人员引入额外的启发式方法来解释差异。在这项工作中，我们分析了来自泊车场景的真实世界数据，并识别出与零侧滑假设的系统性偏差。我们为观察到的效果提供解释，然后提出一种横向速度模型，该模型可以更好地捕捉车辆在泊车期间的横向动力学特性。该模型提高了估计精度，同时仅依赖于两个参数，使其非常适合集成到消费级应用中。

title: Model to Model: Understanding the Venus Flytrap Snapping Mechanism and Transferring it to a 3D-printed Bistable Soft Robotic Demonstrator
summary: The Venus flytrap (Dionaea muscipula) does not only serve as the textbook model for a carnivorous plant, but also has long intrigued both botanists and engineers with its rapidly closing leaf trap. The trap closure is triggered by two consecutive touches of a potential prey, after which the lobes rapidly switch from their concave open-state to their convex close-state and catch the prey within 100-500 ms after being triggered. This transformation from concave to convex is initiated by changes in turgor pressure and the release of stored elastic energy from prestresses in the concave state, which accelerate this movement, leading to inversion of the lobes bi-axial curvature. Possessing two low-energy states, the leaves can be characterized as bistable systems. With our research, we seek to deepen the understanding of Venus flytrap motion mechanics and apply its principles to the design of an artificial bistable lobe actuator. We identified geometrical characteristics, such as dimensional ratios and the thickness gradient in the lobe, and transferred these to two 3D-printed bistable actuator models. One actuator parallels the simulated geometry of a Venus flytrap leaf, the other is a lobe model designed with CAD. Both models display concave-convex bi-stability and snap close. These demonstrators are the first step in the development of an artificial Venus flytrap that mimics the mechanical behavior of the biological model and can be used as a soft fast gripper.
tldr: This paper analyzes the snapping mechanism of Venus flytraps and transfers it to the design of 3D-printed bistable soft robotic actuators, demonstrating a biomimetic approach to fast gripping.
tldr_zh: 本文分析了维纳斯捕蝇草的捕捉机制，并将其应用于3D打印双稳态软体机器人执行器的设计，展示了一种仿生学的快速抓取方法。
summary_zh: 捕蝇草（Dionaea muscipula）不仅是食肉植物的教科书模型，也以其快速闭合的叶片陷阱长期吸引着植物学家和工程师。当潜在猎物连续两次触碰时，陷阱闭合被触发。之后，叶片迅速从其凹向的开放状态切换至凸向的闭合状态，并在被触发后100-500毫秒内捕获猎物。这种从凹到凸的转变是由膨压的变化以及凹陷状态下预应力释放的储能弹性势能所引发的，这些能量加速了运动，并导致叶片双轴曲率的反转。叶片具有两种低能量状态，可以被视为双稳态系统。我们的研究旨在加深对捕蝇草运动力学的理解，并将其原理应用于人工双稳态叶片驱动器的设计。我们确定了几何特性，例如尺寸比例和叶片中的厚度梯度，并将这些特性转移到两个3D打印的双稳态驱动器模型中。其中一个驱动器与模拟的捕蝇草叶片几何形状平行，另一个是用CAD设计的叶片模型。这两个模型都表现出凹凸双稳态和快速闭合。这些演示器是开发人工捕蝇草的第一步，它可以模仿生物模型的力学行为，并可以用作软性快速夹持器。

title: Design and development of an electronics-free earthworm robot
summary: Soft robotic systems have gained widespread attention due to their inherent flexibility, adaptability, and safety, making them well-suited for varied applications. Among bioinspired designs, earthworm locomotion has been extensively studied for its efficient peristaltic motion, enabling movement in confined and unstructured environments. Existing earthworm-inspired robots primarily utilize pneumatic actuation due to its high force-to-weight ratio and ease of implementation. However, these systems often rely on bulky, power-intensive electronic control units, limiting their practicality. In this work, we present an electronics-free, earthworm-inspired pneumatic robot utilizing a modified Pneumatic Logic Gate (PLG) design. By integrating preconfigured PLG units with bellow actuators, we achieved a plug-and-play style modular system capable of peristaltic locomotion without external electronic components. The proposed design reduces system complexity while maintaining efficient actuation. We characterize the bellow actuators under different operating conditions and evaluate the robots locomotion performance. Our findings demonstrate that the modified PLG-based control system effectively generates peristaltic wave propagation, achieving autonomous motion with minimal deviation. This study serves as a proof of concept for the development of electronics-free, peristaltic soft robots. The proposed system has potential for applications in hazardous environments, where untethered, adaptable locomotion is critical. Future work will focus on further optimizing the robot design and exploring untethered operation using onboard compressed air sources.
tldr: This paper introduces an electronics-free, earthworm-inspired soft robot that uses modified pneumatic logic gates (PLGs) for peristaltic locomotion, potentially enabling applications in hazardous environments where untethered, adaptable movement is crucial.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种无需电子元件、受蚯蚓启发的软体机器人，该机器人使用改进的气动逻辑门 (PLG) 实现蠕动，从而可能在需要无线、适应性运动的危险环境中使用。
summary_zh: 软体机器人系统因其固有的灵活性、适应性和安全性而受到广泛关注，使其非常适合各种应用。 在仿生设计中，蚯蚓运动因其高效的蠕动而得到了广泛的研究，使其能够在狭窄和非结构化环境中移动。 现有的蚯蚓机器人主要采用气动驱动，因为其具有较高的力重比和易于实现的特点。 然而，这些系统通常依赖于笨重、耗电的电子控制单元，从而限制了它们的实用性。 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种无需电子器件的、受蚯蚓启发的、采用改进型气动逻辑门（PLG）设计的气动机器人。 通过将预先配置的PLG单元与波纹管致动器集成，我们实现了一种即插即用的模块化系统，该系统能够在没有外部电子元件的情况下进行蠕动。 所提出的设计降低了系统复杂性，同时保持了高效的驱动。 我们对不同工况下的波纹管致动器进行了表征，并评估了机器人的运动性能。 我们的研究结果表明，改进的基于PLG的控制系统有效地产生了蠕动波传播，实现了偏差最小的自主运动。 这项研究为开发无需电子器件的蠕动式软体机器人提供了一个概念验证。 所提出的系统在危险环境中具有应用潜力，在这些环境中，无需连接的自适应运动至关重要。 未来的工作将侧重于进一步优化机器人设计，并探索使用车载压缩空气源的无线操作。

title: A High-Speed Capable Spherical Robot
summary: This paper designs a new spherical robot structure capable of supporting high-speed motion at up to 10 m/s. Building upon a single-pendulum-driven spherical robot, the design incorporates a momentum wheel with an axis aligned with the secondary pendulum, creating a novel spherical robot structure. Practical experiments with the physical prototype have demonstrated that this new spherical robot can achieve stable high-speed motion through simple decoupled control, which was unattainable with the original structure. The spherical robot designed for high-speed motion not only increases speed but also significantly enhances obstacle-crossing performance and terrain robustness.
tldr: The paper presents a novel spherical robot design incorporating a momentum wheel for stable high-speed motion (up to 10 m/s), improved obstacle crossing, and better terrain robustness, demonstrated through physical prototype experiments.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新型球形机器人设计，该机器人结合了动量轮，实现了高达10米/秒的稳定高速运动，并改善了越障能力和地形适应性，这些优点已通过物理原型实验得到证实。
summary_zh: 本文设计了一种新型球形机器人结构，能够支持高达10米/秒的高速运动。基于单摆驱动球形机器人，该设计引入了一个动量轮，其轴线与次级摆对齐，从而创建了一种新颖的球形机器人结构。物理样机的实际实验表明，这种新型球形机器人可以通过简单的解耦控制实现稳定的高速运动，这在原始结构中是无法实现的。这种为高速运动设计的球形机器人不仅提高了速度，还显著增强了越障性能和地形适应性。

title: Improving Needle Penetration via Precise Rotational Insertion Using Iterative Learning Control
summary: Achieving precise control of robotic tool paths is often challenged by inherent system misalignments, unmodeled dynamics, and actuation inaccuracies. This work introduces an Iterative Learning Control (ILC) strategy to enable precise rotational insertion of a tool during robotic surgery, improving penetration efficacy and safety compared to straight insertion tested in subretinal injection. A 4 degree of freedom (DOF) robot manipulator is used, where misalignment of the fourth joint complicates the simple application of needle rotation, motivating an ILC approach that iteratively adjusts joint commands based on positional feedback. The process begins with calibrating the forward kinematics for the chosen surgical tool to achieve higher accuracy, followed by successive ILC iterations guided by Optical Coherence Tomography (OCT) volume scans to measure the error and refine control inputs. Experimental results, tested on subretinal injection tasks on ex vivo pig eyes, show that the optimized trajectory resulted in higher success rates in tissue penetration and subretinal injection compared to straight insertion, demonstrating the effectiveness of ILC in overcoming misalignment challenges. This approach offers potential applications for other high precision robot tasks requiring controlled insertions as well.
tldr: This paper presents an Iterative Learning Control (ILC) strategy for precise rotational needle insertion during robotic surgery, validated through subretinal injection experiments, demonstrating improved penetration efficacy compared to straight insertion.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种迭代学习控制（ILC）策略，用于机器人手术中精确的旋转针插入。通过视网膜下注射实验验证，与直线插入相比，该策略显示出更高的穿透效率。
summary_zh: 实现机器人工具路径的精确控制常常受到固有系统偏差、未建模动力学和驱动不准确等因素的挑战。本研究提出了一种迭代学习控制（ILC）策略，以实现机器人手术中工具的精确旋转插入，与在视网膜下注射中测试的直线插入相比，提高了穿透效果和安全性。使用了一个四自由度（DOF）的机器人机械臂，其中第四个关节的偏差使简单的针旋转应用复杂化，因此采用基于位置反馈迭代调整关节指令的ILC方法。该过程首先校准所选手术工具的正向运动学，以获得更高的精度，然后通过光学相干断层扫描（OCT）体积扫描引导后续的ILC迭代，以测量误差并改进控制输入。在离体猪眼视网膜下注射任务中进行的实验结果表明，与直线插入相比，优化后的轨迹在组织穿透和视网膜下注射中获得了更高的成功率，证明了ILC在克服偏差挑战方面的有效性。这种方法也为其他需要受控插入的高精度机器人任务提供了潜在的应用。

title: Saliency-Guided Domain Adaptation for Left-Hand Driving in Autonomous Steering
summary: Domain adaptation is required for automated driving models to generalize well across diverse road conditions. This paper explores a training method for domain adaptation to adapt PilotNet, an end-to-end deep learning-based model, for left-hand driving conditions using real-world Australian highway data. Four training methods were evaluated: (1) a baseline model trained on U.S. right-hand driving data, (2) a model trained on flipped U.S. data, (3) a model pretrained on U.S. data and then fine-tuned on Australian highways, and (4) a model pretrained on flipped U.S. data and then finetuned on Australian highways. This setup examines whether incorporating flipped data enhances the model adaptation by providing an initial left-hand driving alignment. The paper compares model performance regarding steering prediction accuracy and attention, using saliency-based analysis to measure attention shifts across significant road regions. Results show that pretraining on flipped data alone worsens prediction stability due to misaligned feature representations, but significantly improves adaptation when followed by fine-tuning, leading to lower prediction error and stronger focus on left-side cues. To validate this approach across different architectures, the same experiments were done on ResNet, which confirmed similar adaptation trends. These findings emphasize the importance of preprocessing techniques, such as flipped-data pretraining, followed by fine-tuning to improve model adaptation with minimal retraining requirements.
tldr: This paper explores domain adaptation techniques, specifically using flipped data pretraining and fine-tuning, to improve autonomous steering models for left-hand driving in Australia, demonstrating improved performance and attention to left-side cues. The approach is validated on both PilotNet and ResNet architectures.
tldr_zh: 本文探讨了领域自适应技术，特别是使用翻转数据预训练和微调，以改进澳大利亚左侧驾驶的自动驾驶模型，展示了改进的性能和对左侧线索的关注。该方法已在 PilotNet 和 ResNet 架构上得到验证。
summary_zh: 领域自适应是自动驾驶模型在各种道路条件下良好泛化的必要条件。本文探讨了一种领域自适应训练方法，用于使基于端到端深度学习的模型PilotNet适应左侧驾驶条件，并使用真实的澳大利亚高速公路数据。评估了四种训练方法：（1）在美国右侧驾驶数据上训练的基线模型，（2）在美国翻转数据上训练的模型，（3）在美国数据上预训练并在澳大利亚高速公路上微调的模型，以及（4）在美国翻转数据上预训练并在澳大利亚高速公路上微调的模型。该设置旨在检验通过提供初始的左侧驾驶对齐，整合翻转数据是否能增强模型的自适应能力。本文通过显著性分析来衡量关键道路区域的注意力转移，并比较模型在转向预测精度和注意力方面的性能。结果表明，由于特征表示错位，单独进行翻转数据的预训练会降低预测稳定性，但随后进行微调则会显著提高自适应能力，从而降低预测误差并更强烈地关注左侧线索。为了验证该方法在不同架构中的有效性，还在ResNet上进行了相同的实验，证实了类似的自适应趋势。这些发现强调了诸如翻转数据预训练之类的预处理技术，以及随后进行微调对于以最小的再训练需求来改善模型自适应的重要性。

title: Tackling the Kidnapped Robot Problem via Sparse Feasible Hypothesis Sampling and Reliable Batched Multi-Stage Inference
summary: This paper addresses the Kidnapped Robot Problem (KRP), a core localization challenge of relocalizing a robot in a known map without prior pose estimate when localization loss or at SLAM initialization. For this purpose, a passive 2-D global relocalization framework is proposed. It estimates the global pose efficiently and reliably from a single LiDAR scan and an occupancy grid map while the robot remains stationary, thereby enhancing the long-term autonomy of mobile robots. The proposed framework casts global relocalization as a non-convex problem and solves it via the multi-hypothesis scheme with batched multi-stage inference and early termination, balancing completeness and efficiency. The Rapidly-exploring Random Tree (RRT), under traversability constraints, asymptotically covers the reachable space to generate sparse, uniformly distributed feasible positional hypotheses, fundamentally reducing the sampling space. The hypotheses are preliminarily ordered by the proposed Scan Mean Absolute Difference (SMAD), a coarse beam-error level metric that facilitates the early termination by prioritizing high-likelihood candidates. The SMAD computation is optimized for limited scan measurements. The Translation-Affinity Scan-to-Map Alignment Metric (TAM) is proposed for reliable orientation selection at hypothesized positions and accurate final global pose evaluation to mitigate degradation in conventional likelihood-field metrics under translational uncertainty induced by sparse hypotheses, as well as non-panoramic LiDAR scan and environmental changes. Real-world experiments on a resource-constrained mobile robot with non-panoramic LiDAR scans show that the proposed framework achieves competitive performance in success rate, robustness under measurement uncertainty, and computational efficiency.
tldr: This paper presents a framework for global robot relocalization using LiDAR scans and occupancy grid maps, addressing the Kidnapped Robot Problem with a sparse hypothesis sampling and multi-stage inference approach to improve efficiency and robustness.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种使用激光雷达扫描和栅格地图进行全局机器人重定位的框架，通过稀疏假设采样和多阶段推理来解决绑架机器人问题，从而提高效率和鲁棒性。
summary_zh: 本文研究了绑架机器人问题（KRP），这是重定位中的一个核心挑战，即在已知地图中重定位机器人，在定位信息丢失或SLAM初始化时，无需先验位姿估计。为此，提出了一种被动的二维全局重定位框架。该框架仅利用单个激光雷达扫描和一个占据栅格地图，高效可靠地估计全局位姿，同时保持机器人静止，从而增强移动机器人的长期自主性。所提出的框架将全局重定位转化为一个非凸问题，并通过具有批处理多阶段推理和提前终止的多假设方案来解决，从而平衡完整性和效率。快速扩展随机树（RRT）在可通行性约束下，渐近覆盖可达空间，生成稀疏、均匀分布的可行位置假设，从根本上减少了采样空间。这些假设通过提出的扫描平均绝对差（SMAD）进行初步排序，SMAD是一种粗略的光束误差级别度量，通过优先考虑高似然候选者来促进提前终止。针对有限的扫描测量数据，对SMAD的计算进行了优化。提出了平移亲和力扫描到地图对齐度量（TAM），用于在假设位置进行可靠的方向选择和精确的最终全局位姿评估，以减轻由稀疏假设引起的平移不确定性以及非全景激光雷达扫描和环境变化导致的传统似然场度量的性能下降。在使用非全景激光雷达扫描仪的资源受限的移动机器人上进行的真实世界实验表明，所提出的框架在成功率、测量不确定性下的鲁棒性和计算效率方面都取得了具有竞争力的性能。

title: Wonder3D++: Cross-domain Diffusion for High-fidelity 3D Generation from a Single Image
summary: In this work, we introduce \textbf{Wonder3D++}, a novel method for efficiently generating high-fidelity textured meshes from single-view images. Recent methods based on Score Distillation Sampling (SDS) have shown the potential to recover 3D geometry from 2D diffusion priors, but they typically suffer from time-consuming per-shape optimization and inconsistent geometry. In contrast, certain works directly produce 3D information via fast network inferences, but their results are often of low quality and lack geometric details. To holistically improve the quality, consistency, and efficiency of single-view reconstruction tasks, we propose a cross-domain diffusion model that generates multi-view normal maps and the corresponding color images. To ensure the consistency of generation, we employ a multi-view cross-domain attention mechanism that facilitates information exchange across views and modalities. Lastly, we introduce a cascaded 3D mesh extraction algorithm that drives high-quality surfaces from the multi-view 2D representations in only about $3$ minute in a coarse-to-fine manner. Our extensive evaluations demonstrate that our method achieves high-quality reconstruction results, robust generalization, and good efficiency compared to prior works. Code available at https://github.com/xxlong0/Wonder3D/tree/Wonder3D_Plus.
tldr: Wonder3D++ introduces a cross-domain diffusion model for high-fidelity, efficient 3D mesh generation from a single image by generating multi-view normal maps and color images, achieving improved quality, consistency and speed.
tldr_zh: Wonder3D++ 提出了一种跨域扩散模型，通过生成多视图法线图和彩色图像，从单张图像高效生成高保真 3D 网格，从而提高质量、一致性和速度。
summary_zh: 在这项工作中，我们介绍了一种名为\textbf{Wonder3D++}的新颖方法，用于从单视角图像高效地生成高保真度的纹理网格。最近基于分数蒸馏采样(SDS)的方法已经展现出从二维扩散先验中恢复三维几何的潜力，但它们通常受到耗时的逐形状优化和不一致几何的困扰。相比之下，某些工作通过快速网络推断直接生成三维信息，但它们的结果通常质量较低，缺乏几何细节。为全面提高单视角重建任务的质量、一致性和效率，我们提出了一种跨域扩散模型，用于生成多视角法线贴图和对应的彩色图像。为确保生成的一致性，我们采用了一种多视角跨域注意力机制，促进跨视角和模态的信息交换。最后，我们引入了一种级联三维网格提取算法，以粗到精的方式，大约在3分钟内从多视角二维表示中驱动高质量的表面。我们大量的评估表明，与先前的工作相比，我们的方法实现了高质量的重建结果、稳健的泛化能力以及良好的效率。代码可在https://github.com/xxlong0/Wonder3D/tree/Wonder3D_Plus获取。

title: Real-time Continual Learning on Intel Loihi 2
summary: AI systems on edge devices face a critical challenge in open-world environments: adapting when data distributions shift and novel classes emerge. While offline training dominates current paradigms, online continual learning (OCL)--where models learn incrementally from non-stationary streams without catastrophic forgetting--remains challenging in power-constrained settings. We present a neuromorphic solution called CLP-SNN: a spiking neural network architecture for Continually Learning Prototypes and its implementation on Intel's Loihi 2 chip. Our approach introduces three innovations: (1) event-driven and spatiotemporally sparse local learning, (2) a self-normalizing three-factor learning rule maintaining weight normalization, and (3) integrated neurogenesis and metaplasticity for capacity expansion and forgetting mitigation. On OpenLORIS few-shot learning experiments, CLP-SNN achieves accuracy competitive with replay methods while being rehearsal-free. CLP-SNN delivers transformative efficiency gains: 70\times faster (0.33ms vs 23.2ms), and 5,600\times more energy efficient (0.05mJ vs 281mJ) than the best alternative OCL on edge GPU. This demonstrates that co-designed brain-inspired algorithms and neuromorphic hardware can break traditional accuracy-efficiency trade-offs for future edge AI systems.
tldr: This paper presents CLP-SNN, a neuromorphic spiking neural network for online continual learning on Intel's Loihi 2 chip, achieving significant speed and energy efficiency improvements compared to existing OCL methods on edge GPUs in few-shot learning tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种用于英特尔Loihi 2芯片上的在线持续学习的神经形态脉冲神经网络CLP-SNN，在少样本学习任务中，与边缘GPU上现有的OCL方法相比，实现了显着的运行速度和能源效率提升。
summary_zh: 边缘设备上的人工智能系统在开放世界环境中面临着一个关键挑战：当数据分布发生变化和新类别出现时进行适应。 虽然离线训练在目前的范式中占据主导地位，但在线持续学习 (OCL)——模型从非平稳数据流中增量学习而不发生灾难性遗忘——在功耗受限的环境中仍然具有挑战性。 我们提出了一种神经形态解决方案，称为 CLP-SNN：一种用于持续学习原型Spiking神经网络架构，并在 Intel 的 Loihi 2 芯片上实现。 我们的方法引入了三个创新：（1）事件驱动和时空稀疏的局部学习，（2）一种维持权重归一化的自归一化三因子学习规则，以及（3）用于容量扩展和遗忘缓解的集成神经发生和元可塑性。 在 OpenLORIS 小样本学习实验中，CLP-SNN 实现了与重放方法相当的准确率，同时无需任何排练数据。 CLP-SNN 实现了变革性的效率提升：比边缘 GPU 上最佳的替代 OCL 方法快 70 倍（0.33 毫秒 vs 23.2 毫秒），能效高 5,600 倍（0.05 毫焦耳 vs 281 毫焦耳）。 这表明，协同设计的受大脑启发算法和神经形态硬件可以打破未来边缘人工智能系统的传统准确率与效率之间的权衡。

title: OmniFuser: Adaptive Multimodal Fusion for Service-Oriented Predictive Maintenance
summary: Accurate and timely prediction of tool conditions is critical for intelligent manufacturing systems, where unplanned tool failures can lead to quality degradation and production downtime. In modern industrial environments, predictive maintenance is increasingly implemented as an intelligent service that integrates sensing, analysis, and decision support across production processes. To meet the demand for reliable and service-oriented operation, we present OmniFuser, a multimodal learning framework for predictive maintenance of milling tools that leverages both visual and sensor data. It performs parallel feature extraction from high-resolution tool images and cutting-force signals, capturing complementary spatiotemporal patterns across modalities. To effectively integrate heterogeneous features, OmniFuser employs a contamination-free cross-modal fusion mechanism that disentangles shared and modality-specific components, allowing for efficient cross-modal interaction. Furthermore, a recursive refinement pathway functions as an anchor mechanism, consistently retaining residual information to stabilize fusion dynamics. The learned representations can be encapsulated as reusable maintenance service modules, supporting both tool-state classification (e.g., Sharp, Used, Dulled) and multi-step force signal forecasting. Experiments on real-world milling datasets demonstrate that OmniFuser consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, providing a dependable foundation for building intelligent industrial maintenance services.
tldr: The paper presents OmniFuser, a multimodal learning framework for predictive maintenance of milling tools using visual and sensor data with a contamination-free cross-modal fusion mechanism and recursive refinement pathway. It outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on real-world datasets.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了OmniFuser，一个用于铣削工具预测性维护的多模态学习框架，它使用视觉和传感器数据，具有无污染的跨模态融合机制和递归细化路径。在真实世界数据集上，该方法优于最先进的基线方法。
summary_zh: 刀具状态的准确和及时预测对于智能制造系统至关重要，因为计划外的刀具故障会导致质量下降和生产停机。在现代工业环境中，预测性维护正日益被实施为一种智能服务，它整合了生产过程中的感知、分析和决策支持。为了满足可靠且面向服务的操作需求，我们提出了一种名为OmniFuser的多模态学习框架，用于铣削刀具的预测性维护，该框架利用了视觉和传感器数据。它并行地从高分辨率刀具图像和切削力信号中提取特征，捕捉跨模态的互补时空模式。为了有效地整合异构特征，OmniFuser采用了一种无污染跨模态融合机制，该机制解耦了共享和模态特定的成分，从而实现了高效的跨模态交互。此外，递归细化路径用作锚定机制，持续保留残差信息以稳定融合动态。学习到的表征可以被封装为可重用的维护服务模块，支持刀具状态分类（例如，锋利、已用、钝化）和多步力信号预测。在真实世界铣削数据集上的实验表明，OmniFuser始终优于最先进的基线方法，为构建智能工业维护服务提供了可靠的基础。

title: HGFreNet: Hop-hybrid GraphFomer for 3D Human Pose Estimation with Trajectory Consistency in Frequency Domain
summary: 2D-to-3D human pose lifting is a fundamental challenge for 3D human pose estimation in monocular video, where graph convolutional networks (GCNs) and attention mechanisms have proven to be inherently suitable for encoding the spatial-temporal correlations of skeletal joints. However, depth ambiguity and errors in 2D pose estimation lead to incoherence in the 3D trajectory. Previous studies have attempted to restrict jitters in the time domain, for instance, by constraining the differences between adjacent frames while neglecting the global spatial-temporal correlations of skeletal joint motion. To tackle this problem, we design HGFreNet, a novel GraphFormer architecture with hop-hybrid feature aggregation and 3D trajectory consistency in the frequency domain. Specifically, we propose a hop-hybrid graph attention (HGA) module and a Transformer encoder to model global joint spatial-temporal correlations. The HGA module groups all $k$-hop neighbors of a skeletal joint into a hybrid group to enlarge the receptive field and applies the attention mechanism to discover the latent correlations of these groups globally. We then exploit global temporal correlations by constraining trajectory consistency in the frequency domain. To provide 3D information for depth inference across frames and maintain coherence over time, a preliminary network is applied to estimate the 3D pose. Extensive experiments were conducted on two standard benchmark datasets: Human3.6M and MPI-INF-3DHP. The results demonstrate that the proposed HGFreNet outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods in terms of positional accuracy and temporal consistency.
tldr: The paper introduces HGFreNet, a GraphFormer architecture for 3D human pose estimation from monocular video, which employs hop-hybrid feature aggregation and frequency domain trajectory consistency to improve accuracy and temporal coherence.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为HGFreNet的GraphFormer架构，用于从单目视频中进行3D人体姿势估计。该架构采用跳跃混合特征聚合和频域轨迹一致性来提高准确性和时间相干性。
summary_zh: 单目视频中的2D到3D人体姿态提升是3D人体姿态估计的一项基础挑战，图中卷积网络（GCNs）和注意力机制已被证明非常适合编码骨骼关节的时空相关性。然而，深度歧义和2D姿态估计中的误差导致3D轨迹的不连贯。以往的研究试图限制时域中的抖动，例如，通过约束相邻帧之间的差异，而忽略了骨骼关节运动的全局时空相关性。为了解决这个问题，我们设计了HGFreNet，一种新颖的GraphFormer架构，具有跳跃混合特征聚合和频域中的3D轨迹一致性。具体而言，我们提出了一个跳跃混合图注意力（HGA）模块和一个Transformer编码器来建模全局关节时空相关性。 HGA模块将骨骼关节的所有$k$-hop邻居分组到一个混合组中，以扩大感受野，并应用注意力机制来全局发现这些组的潜在相关性。然后，我们通过约束频域中的轨迹一致性来利用全局时间相关性。为了为跨帧的深度推断提供3D信息并保持时间上的一致性，我们应用了一个初步网络来估计3D姿态。 在两个标准基准数据集Human3.6M和MPI-INF-3DHP上进行了广泛的实验。 实验结果表明，所提出的HGFreNet在位置精度和时间一致性方面均优于最先进（SOTA）的方法。

title: Toward Strategy Identification and Subtask Decomposition In Task Exploration
summary: This research builds on work in anticipatory human-machine interaction, a subfield of human-machine interaction where machines can facilitate advantageous interactions by anticipating a user's future state. The aim of this research is to further a machine's understanding of user knowledge, skill, and behavior in pursuit of implicit coordination. A task explorer pipeline was developed that uses clustering techniques, paired with factor analysis and string edit distance, to automatically identify key global and local strategies that are used to complete tasks. Global strategies identify generalized sets of actions used to complete tasks, while local strategies identify sequences that used those sets of actions in a similar composition. Additionally, meaningful subtasks of various lengths are identified within the tasks. The task explorer pipeline was able to automatically identify key strategies used to complete tasks and encode user runs with hierarchical subtask structures. In addition, a Task Explorer application was developed to easily review pipeline results. The task explorer pipeline can be easily modified to any action-based time-series data and the identified strategies and subtasks help to inform humans and machines on user knowledge, skill, and behavior.
