tldr: The paper introduces a task explorer pipeline that automatically identifies key global and local strategies and subtasks in action-based time-series data to understand user knowledge, skill, and behavior for anticipatory human-machine interaction.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个任务探索管道，可以自动识别基于动作的时间序列数据中的关键全局和局部策略以及子任务，从而理解用户的知识、技能和行为，以用于预测性人机交互。
summary_zh: 本研究基于预期性人机交互领域的工作，此人机交互子领域旨在通过机器预测用户的未来状态来促进有利的交互。 本研究的目标是加深机器对用户知识、技能和行为的理解，以实现隐性协调。 开发了一个任务探索器流程，它结合了聚类技术，以及因子分析和字符串编辑距离，来自动识别用于完成任务的关键全局和局部策略。 全局策略识别用于完成任务的广义动作集合，而局部策略识别以相似组合方式使用这些动作集合的序列。 此外，还识别了任务中各种长度的有意义的子任务。 任务探索器流程能够自动识别用于完成任务的关键策略，并以分层子任务结构编码用户操作轨迹。 此外，还开发了一个任务探索器应用程序，以方便地审查流程结果。 任务探索器流程可以很容易地修改以应用于任何基于动作的时间序列数据，并且识别出的策略和子任务有助于告知人类和机器关于用户的知识、技能和行为。

title: MVSMamba: Multi-View Stereo with State Space Model
summary: Robust feature representations are essential for learning-based Multi-View Stereo (MVS), which relies on accurate feature matching. Recent MVS methods leverage Transformers to capture long-range dependencies based on local features extracted by conventional feature pyramid networks. However, the quadratic complexity of Transformer-based MVS methods poses challenges to balance performance and efficiency. Motivated by the global modeling capability and linear complexity of the Mamba architecture, we propose MVSMamba, the first Mamba-based MVS network. MVSMamba enables efficient global feature aggregation with minimal computational overhead. To fully exploit Mamba's potential in MVS, we propose a Dynamic Mamba module (DM-module) based on a novel reference-centered dynamic scanning strategy, which enables: (1) Efficient intra- and inter-view feature interaction from the reference to source views, (2) Omnidirectional multi-view feature representations, and (3) Multi-scale global feature aggregation. Extensive experimental results demonstrate MVSMamba outperforms state-of-the-art MVS methods on the DTU dataset and the Tanks-and-Temples benchmark with both superior performance and efficiency. The source code is available at https://github.com/JianfeiJ/MVSMamba.
tldr: The paper introduces MVSMamba, a novel Multi-View Stereo network leveraging the Mamba architecture for efficient global feature aggregation outperforming state-of-the-art methods in performance and efficiency. It uses a Dynamic Mamba module for improved feature interaction and representation.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 MVSMamba，一种新的多视图立体网络，利用 Mamba 架构实现高效的全局特征聚合，并在性能和效率上优于最先进的方法。它使用动态 Mamba 模块来改进特征交互和表示。
summary_zh: 鲁棒的特征表示对于基于学习的多视角立体视觉 (MVS) 至关重要，它依赖于精确的特征匹配。最近的MVS方法利用Transformer来捕获基于传统特征金字塔网络提取的局部特征的长程依赖关系。然而，基于Transformer的MVS方法的二次复杂度对平衡性能和效率提出了挑战。受Mamba架构的全局建模能力和线性复杂度的启发，我们提出了MVSMamba，第一个基于Mamba的MVS网络。MVSMamba以最小的计算开销实现了高效的全局特征聚合。为了充分挖掘Mamba在MVS中的潜力，我们提出了一种基于新型参考中心动态扫描策略的动态Mamba模块（DM-module），该模块能够实现：（1）从参考视图到源视图的高效的视图内和视图间特征交互；（2）全向多视图特征表示；（3）多尺度全局特征聚合。大量的实验结果表明，MVSMamba在DTU数据集和Tanks-and-Temples基准测试中优于最先进的MVS方法，同时具有卓越的性能和效率。源代码可在https://github.com/JianfeiJ/MVSMamba获取。

title: Source-Only Cross-Weather LiDAR via Geometry-Aware Point Drop
summary: LiDAR semantic segmentation degrades in adverse weather because refraction, scattering, and point dropouts corrupt geometry. Prior work in weather simulation, mixing-based augmentation, domain randomization, and uncertainty or boundary regularization improves robustness but still overlooks structural vulnerabilities near boundaries, corners, and sparse regions. We present a Light Geometry-aware adapter. The module aligns azimuth and applies horizontal circular padding to preserve neighbor continuity across the 0~360 degree wrap-around boundary. A local-window K-Nearest Neighbors gathers nearby points and computes simple local statistics, which are compressed into compact geometry-aware cues. During training, these cues drive region-aware regularization that stabilizes predictions in structurally fragile areas. The adapter is plug and play, complements augmentation, and can be enabled only during training with negligible inference cost. We adopt a source-only cross-weather setup where models train on SemanticKITTI and are evaluated on SemanticSTF without target labels or fine-tuning. The adapter improves mIoU by 7.9 percentage points over the data-centric augmentation baseline and by 0.6 points over the class-centric regularization baseline. These results indicate that geometry-driven regularization is a key direction for all-weather LiDAR segmentation.
tldr: This paper introduces a geometry-aware adapter for LiDAR semantic segmentation to improve robustness in adverse weather, particularly focusing on structural vulnerabilities. It trains on one dataset and evaluates on another without fine-tuning, achieving improved mean Intersection over Union via a region-aware regularization approach.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种用于激光雷达语义分割的几何感知适配器，旨在提高在恶劣天气下的鲁棒性，特别关注结构脆弱性。 它在一个数据集上训练，并在另一个数据集上评估，无需微调，并通过区域感知正则化方法实现了改进的平均交并比。
summary_zh: 激光雷达语义分割在恶劣天气下性能下降，因为折射、散射和点云缺失破坏了几何结构。先前在天气模拟、基于混合的增强、领域随机化以及不确定性或边界正则化方面的工作提高了鲁棒性，但仍然忽略了边界、角落和稀疏区域附近的结构脆弱性。我们提出了一种轻量级的几何感知适配器。该模块对齐方位角并应用水平圆形填充以保持0~360度环绕边界上的邻域连续性。局部窗口的K近邻算法收集附近的点并计算简单的局部统计量，这些统计量被压缩成紧凑的几何感知线索。在训练期间，这些线索驱动区域感知正则化，从而稳定结构脆弱区域的预测。该适配器是即插即用的，补充了数据增强，并且可以仅在训练期间启用，推理成本可忽略不计。我们采用一种仅源域的跨天气设置，模型在SemanticKITTI上训练，并在没有目标标签或微调的情况下在SemanticSTF上评估。该适配器比以数据为中心的增强基线提高了7.9个百分点的mIoU，比以类别为中心的正则化基线提高了0.6个百分点。这些结果表明，几何驱动的正则化是全天候激光雷达分割的关键方向。

title: Towards Reliable Human Evaluations in Gesture Generation: Insights from a Community-Driven State-of-the-Art Benchmark
summary: We review human evaluation practices in automated, speech-driven 3D gesture generation and find a lack of standardisation and frequent use of flawed experimental setups. This leads to a situation where it is impossible to know how different methods compare, or what the state of the art is. In order to address common shortcomings of evaluation design, and to standardise future user studies in gesture-generation works, we introduce a detailed human evaluation protocol for the widely-used BEAT2 motion-capture dataset. Using this protocol, we conduct large-scale crowdsourced evaluation to rank six recent gesture-generation models -- each trained by its original authors -- across two key evaluation dimensions: motion realism and speech-gesture alignment. Our results provide strong evidence that 1) newer models do not consistently outperform earlier approaches; 2) published claims of high motion realism or speech-gesture alignment may not hold up under rigorous evaluation; and 3) the field must adopt disentangled assessments of motion quality and multimodal alignment for accurate benchmarking in order to make progress. Finally, in order to drive standardisation and enable new evaluation research, we will release five hours of synthetic motion from the benchmarked models; over 750 rendered video stimuli from the user studies -- enabling new evaluations without model reimplementation required -- alongside our open-source rendering script, and the 16,000 pairwise human preference votes collected for our benchmark.
tldr: The paper identifies flaws in human evaluation practices for speech-driven gesture generation and proposes a standardized evaluation protocol with a large-scale benchmark, finding inconsistencies in published results and advocating for disentangled assessments.
tldr_zh: 该论文指出了语音驱动手势生成中人为评估实践的缺陷，并提出了一个标准化的评估协议和一个大规模的基准测试，发现已发表结果中的不一致性，并提倡对手势质量和多模态对齐进行分离评估。
summary_zh: 我们回顾了在自动、语音驱动的3D手势生成中的人工评估实践，并发现缺乏标准化以及频繁使用有缺陷的实验设置。这导致无法得知不同方法之间的比较情况，也无法得知当前最佳水平。为了解决评估设计的常见缺陷，并标准化未来手势生成工作中的用户研究，我们为广泛使用的BEAT2动作捕捉数据集引入了一个详细的人工评估协议。利用这个协议，我们进行了大规模的众包评估，以对六个最新的手势生成模型（每个模型都由其原始作者训练）在两个关键评估维度上进行排名：动作真实性和语音-手势对齐。我们的结果提供了强有力的证据，表明：1) 较新的模型并不总是优于早期的方法；2) 已发表的高动作真实性或语音-手势对齐的声明可能无法通过严格的评估；以及3) 为了取得进展，该领域必须采用对动作质量和多模态对齐的解耦评估方法进行准确的基准测试。最后，为了推动标准化并支持新的评估研究，我们将发布来自被测试模型的五个小时的合成动作；来自用户研究的超过750个渲染的视频刺激（无需重新实现模型即可进行新的评估），以及我们的开源渲染脚本，以及为我们的基准收集的16000个成对人类偏好投票。

title: Thermo-responsive closing and reopening artificial Venus Flytrap utilizing shape memory elastomers
summary: Despite their often perceived static and slow nature, some plants can move faster than the blink of an eye. The rapid snap closure motion of the Venus flytrap (Dionaea muscipula) has long captivated the interest of researchers and engineers alike, serving as a model for plant-inspired soft machines and robots. The translation of the fast snapping closure has inspired the development of various artificial Venus flytrap (AVF) systems. However, translating both the closing and reopening motion of D. muscipula into an autonomous plant inspired soft machine has yet to be achieved. In this study, we present an AVF that autonomously closes and reopens, utilizing novel thermo-responsive UV-curable shape memory materials for soft robotic systems. The life-sized thermo-responsive AVF exhibits closing and reopening motions triggered in a naturally occurring temperature range. The doubly curved trap lobes, built from shape memory polymers, close at 38°C, while reopening initiates around 45°C, employing shape memory elastomer strips as antagonistic actuators to facilitate lobe reopening. This work represents the first demonstration of thermo-responsive closing and reopening in an AVF with programmed sequential motion in response to increasing temperature. This approach marks the next step toward autonomously bidirectional moving soft machines/robots.
tldr: This paper presents a novel artificial Venus flytrap (AVF) that autonomously closes and reopens using thermo-responsive shape memory polymers, demonstrating bidirectional motion in a soft robot.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种新型人工维纳斯捕蝇草（AVF），它使用热响应形状记忆聚合物自动关闭和重新打开，展示了软体机器人的双向运动。
summary_zh: 尽管植物通常被认为具有静态和缓慢的特性，但有些植物的运动速度比眨眼还快。维纳斯捕蝇草（Dionaea muscipula）的快速闭合运动长期以来吸引了研究人员和工程师的兴趣，并成为植物启发式软体机器和机器人的模型。对快速闭合运动的转化已经激发了各种人工维纳斯捕蝇草（AVF）系统的开发。然而，将捕蝇草的闭合和重新打开运动都转化为自主的植物启发式软体机器尚未实现。在本研究中，我们提出了一种能够自主闭合和重新打开的AVF，该AVF利用新型热响应型紫外光固化形状记忆材料来构建软体机器人系统。这种真人大小的热响应型AVF在自然发生的温度范围内表现出闭合和重新打开的运动。由形状记忆聚合物制成的双曲面陷阱瓣在38°C时闭合，而重新打开则在45°C左右开始，使用形状记忆弹性体条作为拮抗致动器来促进陷阱瓣的重新打开。这项工作首次展示了在AVF中通过可编程的连续运动响应于温度升高而实现的热响应闭合和重新打开。这种方法标志着向自主双向运动软体机器/机器人迈出了下一步。

title: High-Precision Surgical Robotic System for Intraocular Procedures
summary: Despite the extensive demonstration of robotic systems for both cataract and vitreoretinal procedures, existing technologies or mechanisms still possess insufficient accuracy, precision, and degrees of freedom for instrument manipulation or potentially automated tool exchange during surgical procedures. A new robotic system that focuses on improving tooltip accuracy, tracking performance, and smooth instrument exchange mechanism is therefore designed and manufactured. Its tooltip accuracy, precision, and mechanical capability of maintaining small incision through remote center of motion were externally evaluated using an optical coherence tomography (OCT) system. Through robot calibration and precise coordinate registration, the accuracy of tooltip positioning was measured to be 0.053$\pm$0.031 mm, and the overall performance was demonstrated on an OCT-guided automated cataract lens extraction procedure with deep learning-based pre-operative anatomical modeling and real-time supervision.
tldr: The paper presents a new surgical robotic system for intraocular procedures with improved accuracy and an automated tool exchange mechanism, validated through OCT imaging and automated cataract lens extraction.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种新型眼内手术机器人系统，该系统具有更高的精度和自动工具交换机制，并通过OCT成像和自动白内障晶状体取出术进行了验证。
summary_zh: 尽管已广泛展示了用于白内障和玻璃体视网膜手术的机器人系统，但现有技术或机制仍然存在精度、精确度和器械操作自由度不足的问题，也难以在手术过程中进行潜在的自动化工具交换。因此，设计并制造了一种新型机器人系统，专注于提高工具尖端的准确性、跟踪性能和流畅的器械交换机制。利用光学相干断层扫描（OCT）系统，对该系统通过远程运动中心保持小切口的工具尖端准确性、精度和机械能力进行了外部评估。通过机器人校准和精确的坐标配准，工具尖端定位的准确性经测量为0.053$\pm$0.031毫米，并通过基于深度学习的术前解剖建模和实时监督的OCT引导的自动化白内障晶状体摘除手术演示了该系统的总体性能。

title: Closed-loop Control of Steerable Balloon Endoscopes for Robot-assisted Transcatheter Intracardiac Procedures
summary: To move away from open-heart surgery towards safer transcatheter procedures, there is a growing need for improved imaging techniques and robotic solutions to enable simple, accurate tool navigation. Common imaging modalities, such as fluoroscopy and ultrasound, have limitations that can be overcome using cardioscopy, i.e., direct optical visualization inside the beating heart. We present a cardioscope designed as a steerable balloon. As a balloon, it can be collapsed to pass through the vasculature and subsequently inflated inside the heart for visualization and tool delivery through an integrated working channel. Through careful design of balloon wall thickness, a single input, balloon inflation pressure, is used to independently control two outputs, balloon diameter (corresponding to field of view diameter) and balloon bending angle (enabling precise working channel positioning). This balloon technology can be tuned to produce cardioscopes designed for a range of intracardiac tasks. To illustrate this approach, a balloon design is presented for the specific task of aortic leaflet laceration. Image-based closed-loop control of bending angle is also demonstrated as a means of enabling stable orientation control during tool insertion and removal.
tldr: This paper presents a steerable balloon endoscope for robot-assisted transcatheter intracardiac procedures, using balloon pressure to control field of view and bending angle, with closed-loop control demonstrated for stable orientation during tool manipulation.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于机器人辅助经导管心内手术的可操纵气球内窥镜，利用气球压力来控制视野和弯曲角度，并演示了闭环控制以在工具操作期间实现稳定的方向控制。
summary_zh: 为了摆脱传统开胸手术，转向更安全的经导管手术，人们越来越需要改进的成像技术和机器人解决方案，以实现简单、精准的工具导航。常用的成像方式，如X射线透视和超声，存在一些局限性，而心内窥镜检查，即在跳动的心脏内部进行直接光学可视化，可以克服这些局限性。我们提出了一种设计为可控弯曲球囊的心内窥镜。该球囊可以收缩以通过血管，随后在心脏内部膨胀，用于可视化和通过集成的操作通道进行工具输送。通过精心设计球囊壁厚度，只需一个输入量，即球囊充气压力，就可以独立控制两个输出量，即球囊直径（对应于视野直径）和球囊弯曲角度（实现精确的操作通道定位）。这种球囊技术可以进行调整，以生产适用于各种心内任务的心内窥镜。为了说明这种方法，我们提出了一种针对主动脉瓣叶撕裂特定任务的球囊设计。还演示了基于图像的弯曲角度闭环控制，作为在工具插入和移除过程中实现稳定方向控制的手段。

title: The Ghost in the Keys: A Disklavier Demo for Human-AI Musical Co-Creativity
summary: While generative models for music composition are increasingly capable, their adoption by musicians is hindered by text-prompting, an asynchronous workflow disconnected from the embodied, responsive nature of instrumental performance. To address this, we introduce Aria-Duet, an interactive system facilitating a real-time musical duet between a human pianist and Aria, a state-of-the-art generative model, using a Yamaha Disklavier as a shared physical interface. The framework enables a turn-taking collaboration: the user performs, signals a handover, and the model generates a coherent continuation performed acoustically on the piano. Beyond describing the technical architecture enabling this low-latency interaction, we analyze the system's output from a musicological perspective, finding the model can maintain stylistic semantics and develop coherent phrasal ideas, demonstrating that such embodied systems can engage in musically sophisticated dialogue and open a promising new path for human-AI co-creation.
tldr: The paper introduces Aria-Duet, an interactive system enabling real-time musical duets between a human pianist and a generative model using a Disklavier, demonstrating musically sophisticated dialogue.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个名为Aria-Duet的交互系统，它使用Disklavier实现了人类钢琴家和生成模型之间的实时音乐二重奏，展示了音乐上复杂的对话能力。
summary_zh: 虽然用于音乐创作的生成模型能力日益增强，但文本提示这种异步工作流程与乐器演奏具身和响应性的本质脱节，阻碍了音乐家对这些模型的采用。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了Aria-Duet，一个交互式系统，它利用雅马哈Disklavier作为共享物理接口，促进人类钢琴家和一种先进的生成模型Aria之间的实时音乐二重奏。该框架实现了轮流协作：用户演奏，发出交接信号，然后模型生成一个连贯的延续，并通过钢琴以原声方式演奏出来。除了描述实现这种低延迟交互的技术架构外，我们还从音乐学的角度分析了系统的输出，发现该模型可以保持风格语义并发展连贯的乐句思想，这表明这种具身系统可以参与音乐上复杂精妙的对话，并为人类-人工智能协同创作开辟一条充满希望的新途径。

title: Semantic BIM enrichment for firefighting assets: Fire-ART dataset and panoramic image-based 3D reconstruction
summary: Inventory management of firefighting assets is crucial for emergency preparedness, risk assessment, and on-site fire response. However, conventional methods are inefficient due to limited capabilities in automated asset recognition and reconstruction. To address the challenge, this research introduces the Fire-ART dataset and develops a panoramic image-based reconstruction approach for semantic enrichment of firefighting assets into BIM models. The Fire-ART dataset covers 15 fundamental assets, comprising 2,626 images and 6,627 instances, making it an extensive and publicly accessible dataset for asset recognition. In addition, the reconstruction approach integrates modified cube-map conversion and radius-based spherical camera projection to enhance recognition and localization accuracy. Through validations with two real-world case studies, the proposed approach achieves F1-scores of 73% and 88% and localization errors of 0.620 and 0.428 meters, respectively. The Fire-ART dataset and the reconstruction approach offer valuable resources and robust technical solutions to enhance the accurate digital management of fire safety equipment.
tldr: This paper introduces the Fire-ART dataset and a panoramic image-based 3D reconstruction method for semantic enrichment of firefighting assets into BIM models, demonstrating promising results in real-world case studies.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了Fire-ART数据集和一种基于全景图像的3D重建方法，用于将消防资产进行语义丰富并整合到BIM模型中，并在实际案例研究中展示了有希望的结果。
summary_zh: 消防资产的库存管理对于应急准备、风险评估和现场消防至关重要。然而，由于在自动资产识别和重建方面的能力有限，传统方法效率低下。为了解决这一挑战，本研究引入了Fire-ART数据集，并开发了一种基于全景图像的重建方法，用于将消防资产的语义信息丰富到BIM模型中。Fire-ART数据集涵盖15种基本资产，包含2,626张图像和6,627个实例，使其成为一个广泛且公开可用的资产识别数据集。此外，该重建方法集成了改进的立方体贴图转换和基于半径的球面相机投影，以提高识别和定位精度。通过两个真实案例研究的验证，所提出的方法分别实现了73%和88%的F1分数以及0.620和0.428米的定位误差。Fire-ART数据集和重建方法为增强消防安全设备的精确数字化管理提供了宝贵的资源和稳健的技术解决方案。

title: Koopman-based Prediction of Connectivity for Flying Ad Hoc Networks
summary: The application of machine learning (ML) to communication systems is expected to play a pivotal role in future artificial intelligence (AI)-based next-generation wireless networks. While most existing works focus on ML techniques for static wireless environments, they often face limitations when applied to highly dynamic environments, such as flying ad hoc networks (FANETs). This paper explores the use of data-driven Koopman approaches to address these challenges. Specifically, we investigate how these approaches can model UAV trajectory dynamics within FANETs, enabling more accurate predictions and improved network performance. By leveraging Koopman operator theory, we propose two possible approaches -- centralized and distributed -- to efficiently address the challenges posed by the constantly changing topology of FANETs. To demonstrate this, we consider a FANET performing surveillance with UAVs following pre-determined trajectories and predict signal-to-interference-plus-noise ratios (SINRs) to ensure reliable communication between UAVs. Our results show that these approaches can accurately predict connectivity and isolation events that lead to modelled communication outages. This capability could help UAVs schedule their transmissions based on these predictions.
tldr: This paper uses Koopman operator theory to predict connectivity in flying ad hoc networks (FANETs), particularly focusing on UAV communication reliability in dynamic environments.
tldr_zh: 本文利用 Koopman 算子理论预测飞行自组织网络 (FANET) 中的连接性，特别关注动态环境中无人机通信的可靠性。
summary_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 在通信系统中的应用有望在未来基于人工智能 (AI) 的下一代无线网络中发挥关键作用。虽然大多数现有工作侧重于静态无线环境下的 ML 技术，但当应用于高度动态的环境（如飞行自组织网络 (FANETs)）时，它们通常会面临局限性。本文探讨利用数据驱动的 Koopman 方法来应对这些挑战。具体来说，我们研究了这些方法如何在 FANETs 中对无人机轨迹动力学进行建模，从而实现更精确的预测并提高网络性能。通过利用 Koopman 算子理论，我们提出了两种可能的方法——集中式和分布式——以有效应对 FANETs 不断变化的拓扑结构带来的挑战。为了证明这一点，我们考虑一个 FANET，它执行对无人机进行监控的任务，无人机遵循预定的轨迹，并预测信干噪比 (SINR)，以确保无人机之间的可靠通信。我们的结果表明，这些方法可以准确预测导致建模通信中断的连接和隔离事件。这种能力可以帮助无人机根据这些预测安排它们的传输。

title: Student Engagement in AI Assisted Complex Problem Solving: A Pilot Study of Human AI Rubik's Cube Collaboration
summary: Games and puzzles play important pedagogical roles in STEM learning. New AI algorithms that can solve complex problems offer opportunities for scaffolded instruction in puzzle solving. This paper presents the ALLURE system, which uses an AI algorithm (DeepCubeA) to guide students in solving a common first step of the Rubik's Cube (i.e., the white cross). Using data from a pilot study we present preliminary findings about students' behaviors in the system, how these behaviors are associated with STEM skills - including spatial reasoning, critical thinking and algorithmic thinking. We discuss how data from ALLURE can be used in future educational data mining to understand how students benefit from AI assistance and collaboration when solving complex problems.
tldr: This paper introduces ALLURE, an AI-assisted Rubik's Cube solving system, and presents preliminary findings from a pilot study on student engagement and its connection to STEM skills.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一个名为ALLURE的AI辅助魔方解算系统，并展示了一个关于学生参与度及其与STEM技能之间联系的初步研究结果。
summary_zh: 游戏和谜题在 STEM 学习中扮演着重要的教学角色。能够解决复杂问题的新型人工智能算法为谜题解决中的支架式教学提供了机会。本文介绍了 ALLURE 系统，该系统使用人工智能算法（DeepCubeA）来指导学生解决魔方的一个常见起始步骤（即白色十字）。利用来自一项初步研究的数据，我们展示了关于学生在系统中的行为的初步发现，以及这些行为如何与 STEM 技能相关联，包括空间推理、批判性思维和算法思维。我们讨论了 ALLURE 中的数据如何在未来的教育数据挖掘中被用来理解学生如何在解决复杂问题时从人工智能辅助和协作中获益。
